faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Which Nursing job profile is highly paid?
faqs.answer:
Highest Nursing job is Senior Staff Nurse.
They manage junior staff nurses and Nursing students to make sure patients get best care. 
These nurses are give nursing care to such patients.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great course, great college, and better life .

review_content.Placements: 20 Lacs students write the NEET exam, but only 50 to 60000 students are placed into government medical colleges; hence, it is safe to say that placement percentage for the course is around 1%. There is no particular thing as a package in our course, and after 4 and a half years of studies, we will be given one year of internship, wherein we'll earn around 30000 Rs. monthly.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have well-equipped laboratories with sophisticated equipments and safety measure. Our lab technician are well educated and help us in our studies. The library facility is quite good; we have thousands of books in our library, and there are well-furnished compartments where students can isolate themselves and study properly. As government college, hostels are also government-funded hostels. We will pay around 800 rupees per month as hostel rent and 4000 approximately per month as mess fees, so overall we will pay around 50000 rupees per annum as mess and hostel accommodation fee. We'll get our own bed, share desk, and cupboard to keep our clothes. Washrooms are attached to the room with geysers and showers in it. Mess food is top-notch and premium quality. In case of medical emergencies, free treatment will be given to the student and gym facility is provided by the hostel to the student where they can enhance their physical attributes. Sports activities are encouraged and annual sports meet is held in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and campus.

review_content.Placements: This course is not about the placements; it's about the patients we get to deal with every single day. And to be honest, it's been 2 years that I've been studying at this college, and so far I have seen a huge number of patients in this hospital with a huge variety of cases.
review_content.Infrastructure: Speaking of the infrastructure of our college, it is one of the best, I would say. The lecture hall is vast, well-air-conditioned and equipped with all required facilities. And in the library, you can find a huge number of books by literally every author you have known.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, faculty members and facilities.

review_content.Placements: 99 percent of students got internships, and above 50 percent of students cracked NEET PG and got PG seats in different colleges in India. They are now studying for specialization in different departments, and the other students are now doing their rural service.
review_content.Faculty: All the teachers are well-qualified, knowledgeable, and helpful, both academically and socially. This course makes students independent. The teachers are very strict as far as academics are concerned but are friendly otherwise, as well as cooperative and caring toward their students.

admission_process.title: Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences considers scores in NEET, NEET PG, and KCET for admission to specific courses.Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciencesoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 66 months - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 3 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,69,325. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,16,700 - 3,42,450. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs: What is the last round closing rank for admission to MBBS at Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences for the General category students?
description: Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 18442 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 18442 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 20790 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 68059 to 173279. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pathology, followed by MD in Anatomy. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 68059 and 173279, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In this section, Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 21676 for MBBS.

Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Shimoga Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in General Medicine with a closing cutoff rank of 1625 for the General AI category candidates.

college_info.college_name: Chaudhary Sarwan Kumar Himachal Pradesh Krishi Vishvavidyalaya: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: NIRF 2024 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2024 rankings, Chaudhary Sarwan Kumar Himachal Pradesh Krishi Vishvavidyalaya ranks #19 under the category 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors'.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Life Science (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good university. I think it's the best university in this locality and area.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell and placement team are very good and supportive. They always try to stay in touch with the students, often through the class representative, which helps students get all the necessary information. They help us get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: CSKHPKV Palampur, also known as Choudhary Saravan Kumar Krishi Vishwavidyalaya, has good infrastructure. There are four departments, or we can say four colleges. The College of Basic Sciences, College of Agriculture, College of Community Sciences, and College of Veterinary Sciences. The university has good labs, classrooms, and library facilities. Wi-Fi is also available, which makes studying easier.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review about life in CSK HP KV Palampur as a B.Tech Food Technology student.

review_content.Placements: About placement, I don't know much about that because, in our previous batch, there was no placement I have particularly heard of. But students who are chosen by the professors or teachers, are placed in a good place for their studies and placement options. There are very few food processing companies that can be selected for our future, like Nestlé, Coca-Cola, etc. The top roles will be food inspector, food technologist, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: For our course, there are labs available but in very minimum quantity, and for classrooms, we have a classroom. For the library, there is a very good library at our university. In the hostels, there is a mess which provides us with meals three times and one complimentary meal, which can be called a tea share. For sports, there is a big complex called Swo, and games are part of the university. That is very intellectual for me.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Life Science (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Very Good College with Excellent Faculty and Infrastructure, Great for Personality Development

review_content.Placements: There are no placement offers in my course as it is just a standard graduation degree that makes us eligible for other exams after completing it. Instead of focusing on placements, we should study and prepare for exams like PO in banks, etc. This degree qualifies us to sit for such exams upon completion.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, with excellent facilities in labs, classrooms, and the library. Students who cannot commute daily are provided with hostel accommodations and have access to a health center, student welfare organizations, and a ground, among other amenities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Chaudhary Sarwan Kumar Himachal Pradesh Krishi Vishvavidyalaya.

review_content.Placements: There is a placement cell in the university, but it is not very active. The companies that come with job offers provide the bare minimum packages, and students usually prefer to decline them. Most of the students prefer to pursue higher studies after graduation, which are also very diverse and offer better options.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the lecture theatre is pretty much below par, but construction of a new lecture theatre is underway, though one cannot be sure how long it will take. Wi-Fi facilities are offered in the library and hostel, but otherwise there are signal blockers around the university. The library is heaven for literature enthusiasts and curious minds. They contain hundreds of books, some that cannot be found anywhere else. There is too much knowledge for self-development. The hostel does not have extraordinary sports facilities, but it is still there. The focus is mostly on table tennis and badminton, but there are also talks to develop a basketball court. The rooms in the hostel are spacious, accommodating two to three students, and contain separate wardrobes and tables.

review_content.Placements: It has many jobs in the banking sector and in pursuing a M.Sc. and many others. This year, 7 students were selected for herbicide factories and many got selected in banking and civil service exams. We gain more knowledge about agriculture and various other sectors.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure. It also have library with many good books. All the books related to our course content provide much for further study. Teachers are average and teach quite well, which benefits us. Wi-Fi is not working and it creates problems.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Chaudhary Sarwan Kumar Himachal Pradesh Krishi Vishvavidyalaya.

review_content.Placements: In our college, students have opportunities for placements. Around 20-25% of students get placed in our course. The college focuses on providing the best quality education to the students. Some local companies visit our college for placements. The average package offered is 2-4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had a pretty big and beautiful campus. The infrastructure of this college was well-maintained for our course. Our department had facilities like Physics labs, Chemistry lab, library, Wi-Fi, canteen, etc., for the students. All these facilities were of good quality.

review_summary.college_name: Chaudhary Sarwan Kumar Himachal Pradesh Krishi Vishvavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Life Science (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good university. I think it's the best university in this locality and area.

content.Placements: The placement cell and placement team are very good and supportive. They always try to stay in touch with the students, often through the class representative, which helps students get all the necessary information. They help us get placed.
content.Infrastructure: CSKHPKV Palampur, also known as Choudhary Saravan Kumar Krishi Vishwavidyalaya, has good infrastructure. There are four departments, or we can say four colleges. The College of Basic Sciences, College of Agriculture, College of Community Sciences, and College of Veterinary Sciences. The university has good labs, classrooms, and library facilities. Wi-Fi is also available, which makes studying easier.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review about life in CSK HP KV Palampur as a B.Tech Food Technology student.

content.Placements: About placement, I don't know much about that because, in our previous batch, there was no placement I have particularly heard of. But students who are chosen by the professors or teachers, are placed in a good place for their studies and placement options. There are very few food processing companies that can be selected for our future, like Nestlé, Coca-Cola, etc. The top roles will be food inspector, food technologist, etc.
content.Infrastructure: For our course, there are labs available but in very minimum quantity, and for classrooms, we have a classroom. For the library, there is a very good library at our university. In the hostels, there is a mess which provides us with meals three times and one complimentary meal, which can be called a tea share. For sports, there is a big complex called Swo, and games are part of the university. That is very intellectual for me.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Life Science (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very Good College with Excellent Faculty and Infrastructure, Great for Personality Development

content.Placements: There are no placement offers in my course as it is just a standard graduation degree that makes us eligible for other exams after completing it. Instead of focusing on placements, we should study and prepare for exams like PO in banks, etc. This degree qualifies us to sit for such exams upon completion.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, with excellent facilities in labs, classrooms, and the library. Students who cannot commute daily are provided with hostel accommodations and have access to a health center, student welfare organizations, and a ground, among other amenities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Chaudhary Sarwan Kumar Himachal Pradesh Krishi Vishvavidyalaya.

content.Placements: There is a placement cell in the university, but it is not very active. The companies that come with job offers provide the bare minimum packages, and students usually prefer to decline them. Most of the students prefer to pursue higher studies after graduation, which are also very diverse and offer better options.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the lecture theatre is pretty much below par, but construction of a new lecture theatre is underway, though one cannot be sure how long it will take. Wi-Fi facilities are offered in the library and hostel, but otherwise there are signal blockers around the university. The library is heaven for literature enthusiasts and curious minds. The rooms in the hostel are spacious, accommodating two to three students, and contain separate wardrobes and tables.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chaudhary Sarwan Kumar Himachal Pradesh Krishi Vishvavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a pretty big and beautiful campus. The infrastructure of this college was well-maintained for our course. Our department had facilities like Physics labs, Chemistry lab, library, Wi-Fi, canteen, etc., for the students. All these facilities were of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Experience provided by my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good. No proper classroom and most the machines are not working properly. The good thing about this university is that it has a good library. There is no Wi-Fi in college. The mess food is not so good. The medical facilities are up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you take admission in this university.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not well maintained. The PGs are very well maintained because of seniors. The UG hostel is like a boredom place, which is not good. The hostel fee is valuable and worth for the money paid. The hostels provided by the university are the best. The college provides the best playgrounds and auditorium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by College of Community Science, CSKHPKVReviewed on 18 Mar 2020)
reviews.review_heading: It is a government university so it holds its own value.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very poor in the college premises. There is no internet facility available. The hostel Facilities are still good as Wi-Fi is available and other medical facilities are also available. The quality of the food is average in the hostel mess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good atmosphere to study and prepare for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is great as agriculture is the core field in this university. The library is tremendous, and there is a central library. Ample study materials are available in them. The hostel is decent, and the mess is great as it is handled by students. There is no need to complain about the food.

reviews.review_heading: College life was great with fun, sports, and cultural events. Study level was low.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the view were very beautiful. The university was situated in Palampur, which was a very beautiful place. The conditions of the hostels were good, and the food served was also very good. When I was there, classrooms were not good. But in my last year, the renovation was started, so I think now they are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CSKHPKV Palampur.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is available, the classrooms are satisfactory, the library is good you can find all the required studying material in it. The hostel facility is average too. The washrooms could use a little bit of improvement. The food is gppd and nutritious. The cafeteria has a lot of good food. The college has its own bakery. A health centre is also provived with a qualified doctor within the campus. An annual sports meet is held with a variety of sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good atmosphere. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. Wi-Fi facility is not available on campus. Labs have almost all the equipment. The library has many books. It has books related to courses. Our college has a pleasant nature.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for B.Sc. Agriculture .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is quite good. You will get Library for reading with Wi-Fi equipped, Basketball ground, badminton court, a big ground for playing football and cricket and much more. Classrooms of this university are average. Hostel facilities are great like Wi-Fi, good food and good drinking water.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and location are excellent, but fees are very high for SFS seats.
reviews.review_text: We have well-developed classrooms and a huge examination hall. There is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. Wi-Fi is available at libraries and hostels. Library hours are between 9 a.m. and 12 a.m. There are separate hostels for boys and girls (UG and PG). In girls' hostels, facilities are very good. At the hostel, all necessary things are available, like a washing machine. The quality of the food is good because the mess is excellent.

individual_reviews.title: MGM is one of the top colleges in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: MGM offers internships to every student. Medical is a professional course, so placements are not offered. Students who passed out of our college will probably start their own clinic. Students have equal opportunities and can select another college or hospital to do internships as per their convenience. All the students are also offered with a stipend for the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent, and there are different buildings for different courses like medical, dental, physiotherapy, management, nursing, etc. Every department has its own canteen and a mess for hostellers. Hostels are provided separately for girls and boys because of the safety.

review_content.Placements: Students who passed RMCH with an MBBS degree are eligible to apply to any private or government-run hospital for junior residents and medical officer EMO posts. Most students after MBBS opt for PG, MD, and MS degrees. Students, after passing MBBS, do a mandatory 1-year internship in the college itself .
review_content.Infrastructure: RMCH provides many courses, like MBBS, MD, and MS, in different branches like general medicine, general surgery, ophthalmology, ENT, orthopedics, pediatrics, etc. Lecture theaters have centralized air conditioning and projector screens. A full-AC library with space for 200 students at a time is there .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A good college academically but lacks a little in infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, there is no such thing as placements. After completing MBBS, we have options depending on future plans for different people. First, we can give the NEET PG exam or practice as an MBBS doctor in some government or private hospital. Every year, 150 students do internships in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a hospital of its own, which has every department like surgery, medicine, obg, ophtho, ent, radio, etc. with all facilities of treatment and surgery. The classrooms are well air-conditioned with wooden desks. Proper labs are there for anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, and microbiology. The hostel is provided with Wi-Fi, watercoolers, mess, park, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Rohilkhand Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members, strict rules, average placements, and good campus.

content.Placements: Mostly 80 students get placement. After MBBS, salary varies from Rs 50,000 to 1 lakh in cities like Dehli. We can also pursue some research through this college. Mostly all of us get internship offers. There are about 250 students in my own batch 2023, and the students-teachers ratio is good.
content.Infrastructure: There are 4-5 hostels for boys and girls. A big campus of about 50 acres. There is a good facilitated hospital with an average OPD of 1000-1500. There is an auditorium for cultural events. There are 2 canteens for day schedule and 24-hour water facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My Rmch as a medical School.

content.Placements: There are no placements in my college because it is a private medical college. Everything depends on your knowledge, skills, experience, and family background. The college plays no role in this.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very poor as it is quite old. The hostels are also in very poor condition with improper cleaning, and the hostel warden does not pay attention to our complaints.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are very good except for the principal of the college, who is not effective. Anyone who earns 2 Lacs monthly could do better for the students. However, all other teachers are very good in teaching and other activities. Exams are also fair enough.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: RMCH bareilly complete review.

content.Placements: Students who passed RMCH with an MBBS degree are eligible to apply to any private or government-run hospital for junior residents and medical officer EMO posts. Most students after MBBS opt for PG, MD, and MS degrees. Students, after passing MBBS, do a mandatory 1-year internship in the college itself .
content.Infrastructure: RMCH provides many courses, like MBBS, MD, and MS, in different branches like general medicine, general surgery, ophthalmology, ENT, orthopedics, pediatrics, etc. Lecture theaters have centralized air conditioning and projector screens. A full-AC library with space for 200 students at a time is there .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good college academically but lacks a little in infrastructure.

content.Placements: In MBBS, there is no such thing as placements. After completing MBBS, we have options depending on future plans for different people. First, we can give the NEET PG exam or practice as an MBBS doctor in some government or private hospital. Every year, 150 students do internships in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a hospital of its own, which has every department like surgery, medicine, obg, ophtho, ent, radio, etc. with all facilities of treatment and surgery. The classrooms are well air-conditioned with wooden desks. Proper labs are there for anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, and microbiology. The hostel is provided with Wi-Fi, watercoolers, mess, park, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty and facilities.

content.Placements: Students were eligible for placements from the 8th semester. The salary offered was Rs.60,000 to Rs.90,000 per year. Around 60-70% of students got placements in our college and this is increasing every year.
content.Infrastructure: There were 2 buildings for hostels, each consisting of 300 good rooms. Two-seater rooms were provided to students that consisted of lights, electric boards, beds, study tables, and chairs. The quality of the mess food was the best. It had a menu card. Registration for the hostel was done during academic admission. Students had to fill out the form, and the stamp of the hostel warden was mandatory. After that, students submit the fee as a demand draft.

The hostel is provided with Wi-Fi, watercoolers, mess, park, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There were 2 buildings for hostels, each consisting of 300 good rooms. Two-seater rooms were provided to students that consisted of lights, electric boards, beds, study tables, and chairs. The quality of the mess food was the best. It had a menu card. Registration for the hostel was done during academic admission. Students had to fill out the form, and the stamp of the hostel warden was mandatory. After that, students submit the fee as a demand draft.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is available in our college. Hostel facilities are excellent. The mess facility is available in our hostel. The food served in the mess is good and they provide a variety of food items daily. The hostel fee is 1.5 LPA. Our hostel rooms are spacious. Around 3 students can accommodate in every single room. A personal cupboard is provided for students to store their important things and a single bed for each student.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, excellent faculty, good campus environment and sufficient patient flow.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quite huge, with a basketball court, badminton court, cricket and football ground. The college has a central library, and the books are also available for reference purposes. One can visit the canteen during the lunch break. The hostels don't have Wi-Fi, but Wi-Fi boosters are available. The classrooms or lecture theatres are quite large and with air-conditioning facilities. The clinical labs have good equipment in working condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rohilkhand Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is satisfactory but not worth the money. Our college has a cricket ground, football ground, badminton court, table tennis and also a garden to walk. There is also a separate building for 1st-year boys to avoid ragging. Overall, our college is worth living.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges at high NEET rank.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is satisfactory. Our college has a cricket ground, football ground, badminton court, table tennis and also a garden to walk. Classrooms are also fully air-conditioned, and there is a college library which gives students a kind of overall development.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as it has all the resources needed in a medical college.
reviews.review_text: Students would surely like our college infrastructure. All facilities are provided by the college. There is a cricket ground, football and basketball court and two parks on the campus. There is a Shiv temple inside our college campus, and a children park is also available here.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college. You will enjoy 5 and a half years of your hostel life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is satisfactory but do not worth the money. Our college has a cricket ground, football ground, badminton court, table tennis and also a garden to walk. There is also a separate building for 1st-year boys to avoid ragging. Overall, our college is worthy of living.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides fully air-conditioned classrooms and best infrastructure. Our college has a library which has all sorts of books and manuals. Fresh journals are introduced in it every month. There is an auditorium which has a facility for all sorts of indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: In college and hostels, the students get access to the Wi-Fi, which is of high-speed and free. The classrooms were soo big and can accomodate at least around 300 people easily. There was a central library in the college campus which contains almost all the books for the students. You can issue the books by showing your library card. College also has practical labs where we do practicals. The hostel was of good infrastructure with many facilities like Wi-Fi access, hygiene, electricity. The food ...

reviews.review_heading: Campus is good, but very bad fine system if you do any activity you have to pay a fine.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only available in library. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are average, not too good and not too bad. The quality of life is very bad in the campus. The food available in mess is full of insects and too much oil in which you can swim. Medical facilities, as well as sports facilities, are good. Cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, and many parks are available on-campus.

college_info.intro:
PES College Bangalore is famous for its flagship BTech, MBA, & BSc courses. Studying these PESU Bangalore flagship programmes at PES University helps to support the professional and personal growth of the students. This is done through a holistic and immersive learning experience. BTech students engage with the corporate sector on a variety of platforms ranging from industry visits, workshops, hackathons, internships, and industry-wide events such as summits, seminars, conferences, and others. BTech Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) is one of the most popularly opted specialisation. Some of the key highlights of this programme are below:
PES University Bangalore MBA is a full-time, 2-year programme, which consists of a core curriculum along with an internship and various elective courses. PES MBA Bangalore is offered in various major specialisations, including Business Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Human Capital, and Operation Management, among others. The PESU Venture Labs, established by the university, funds the business ideas of students, to help them realise their dream of becoming an entrepreneur. Here is more info around PES College Bangalore courses:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

faqs.answer: A:    PES University offers PharmD as a 6 year course with an annual intake of 30 students. The University offers the respective course with a total tuition fees worth INR 16.8 Lakh. Admission to PharmD is offered on then basis of valid scores of KCET. Candidates must visit the official website to learn more about the eligibility criteria for the admission to PharmD.
faqs.question: What is the fees for PharmD course at PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    PES Bangalore offers courses at the UG, PG and PhD level across the fields of Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Design, Management and Commerce, Economics and many more, The University offers these courses on the basis of merit and various accepted entrance exams. PES Bangalore fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 20 Lakh. In comparison to other universities, the cost of academia is higher. However, the University various other facilities apart from academia which is worth the cost being paid.
faqs.question: How costly is PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to MCA at PES University, there is minimum eligibility criteria that needs to fulfil before applying for this course. Interested candidates need to pass graduation either with a minimum 50% aggregate in BSc/BCom/BA with Mathematics as one of the subjects at Class 12 or graduation level or in BCA with a minimum 50% aggregate. Final year students can also apply on a provisional basis, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria at the time of admission. The admission to MCA course will be based on PESSAT or PGCET score.
faqs.question: What is the qualification for MCA in PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, admission to BTech is entrance-based. Students can take admission to the BTech course of PES University through JEE Main. The university considers JEE Main scores for admission to all the BTech specialisations, including Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and more. The other option for the BTech course admission is to qualify PESSAT or KCET entrance exams. Interested candidates are required to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria before applying for the course as a mandatory step. Check here for detailed admission process for BTech.

reviews_list.review_title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

review_content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

review_summary.college_name: PES University Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: A total of 740 in the seniors' batch. Around 540 have been placed, and many have gone for higher studies. The highest package was 60 LPA. The median is around 12-13 LPA, and the lowest is not available. Companies like Zomato, IBM, Google, AWS, etc., come to this college. The top roles include SDE and ML engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.

content.Placements: In electronics and communication the placement was not that good compared to CSE till last year. The placements are decent for ECE but then in the last year there is a slight dip in the placements for CSE. The placement ratio is almost the same as before.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

admission_overview.college_name: PES University Bangalore Admission 2026: Dates, Eligibility and Selection Fee & Application

admission_overview.title: PES University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: PES University admission 2026 is open for UG, PG and PhD programmes. The private university in Bangalore offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations at UG, PG and doctoral levels. programs are offered in the domains of Engineering, Maedicine, Management and Life Sciences. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice. Admission in the university is primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc. for specific courses. In addition, PES University conducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT for UG and PG programmes. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode. requirements of return on investment for the institution's high fee costs are met with competitive placements.

eligibility_selection.title: PES University Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: PES University admission to courses is through various national and state-level entrance exams. Candidates can apply for UG courses after Class 12 and PG courses after completing graduation. The university conducts PESSAT for admission to various courses. faqs.answer: PES Bangalore offers courses at the UG, PG and PhD level across the fields of Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Design, Management and Commerce, Economics and many more, The University offers these courses on the basis of merit and various accepted entrance exams. PES Bangalore fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 20 Lakh. In comparison to other universities, the cost of academia is higher. However, the University various other facilities apart from academia which is worth the cost being paid.
faqs.question: How costly is PES University?

paragraphs: PES University admission 2026is majorly based on entrance scores. It accepts scores of certain entrance exams such as-JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc.PES Universityconducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT. The university offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations atUG, PG and doctoral levels. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice.PES University admissionto UG and PG courses is based on PESSAT score. There are around 27 courses offered in multiple streams at PES. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode.

PES University admission processincludes registration, entrance exam, counselling, etc. Candidates are first required to register for any of the preferred course. Check below, detailed step wise admission process for PES University:
1. Application

Application forms are available online on the official website of the university. There is a application fee of INR 1,200 which needs to be paid for submitting the form.Candidates must also keep the specified documents ready for registration.
2. Slot Booking

After submission of the form, the candidates have to book a slot for the PESSAT exam. This step is valid only for candidates appearing for PESSAT. Once they have booked their slot, an admit card will be issued. Aspirants must download their admit card.
3. Selection Rounds

PES University admission criteria include eligibility and an entrance exam followed by other selection rounds. The criteria vary as per the course. PESSAT conducted by PES University is accepted for admission to all the courses. National or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, KCET, GATE, etc. are required for admission to specific courses. PES conducts an interview round for shortlisted candidates for admission to some courses.
STEP 4: Counselling

The selected candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to payPES University feeto get a seat in the university. Once the fee is paid, candidates can report to the institute.

PES University feesinclude multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. Any refund in fee will be done as per current UGC refund norms only. Affordability is one of the reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. The university also considers the marks obtained in the qualifying examination for admission. In order to get admission to BBA at PES University, student need to pass Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in the respective subjects as per the minimum eligibility criteria. The final selection is done based on the performance of candidates in the personal interview (PI) round, that is conducted at the university.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA in PES University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for PES University BBA ranges betweenINR 6 lakh and INR 10.4 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.Candidates need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee after completion of the selection rounds. Apart from the programe fee, aspirants also need to pay a registration fee of INR 1,150. Candidates can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BBA at PES University
faqs.answer: Candidates who want to take admission in BBA at PES University must check their eligibility and appear for the university’s in-house entrance exam, i.e., PESSAT. The PESSAT 2025 exam will be conducted online as a computer-based test at the PES University campus and in 44 cities in the country. The university shortlists candidates based on entrance exam scores.PESSAT resultsare released within three days from the day of the test. Aspirants preparing for the university exam, must checkPESSAT exam

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in PES University?
faqs.answer: For getting seats in PES University, the student must satisfy eligibility criteria, give the PESSAT entrance exam, and then provide rank. Once students qualify for the entrance exam, they are short-listed on the basis of available seats and rank for counseling. Counseling will provide them with seats. So, proper application is to be followed and documents should reach the University in the time frame.

faqs.question: Is PES University admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions to the UG and PG programmes conducted at PES University are now open. All applicants have to fill their online application form at the university portal and enroll themselves for entrance tests such as PESSAT or any other entrance test valid throughout the country.

faqs.question: Can I join PES University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: If you qualify the eligibility criteria, then you can get admission to PES University after clearing class 12 and apply for the course you are interested in. Most courses would require to have passed class 12 with a good percentage and apprear in the PESSAT entrace exam. After clearing the entrace exam, you should be able to secure a seat for your preferred course.

faqs.question: Is PESSAT compulsory for PES University?
faqs.answer: Almost all courses in PES University can be admitted to if a student qualifies through PESSAT. It is the only entrance exam that the college looks into and includes for eligibility in their courses. However, in such exceptional cases like direct admission allowed for the high achievers, one may be exempted from the PESSAT process. Therefore, candidates have to clear the PESSAT exam with the prescribed minimum cutoff.

placement_data.title: PES University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: PES University has released the 2025 placement data. The overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 68 LPA . Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. The top recruiters of PES University in 2025 include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

In addition to offering placement opportunities to the students, the placements wing of the University looks after the training of students on a continuing basis. In 2025, the students received more than 1,250 internship offers from reputed companies like SAP, NVIDIA, Siemens, etc.

faqs.question: Which college provides a better median salary for B.Pharma: DIT University - Admission Office or PES University?
faqs.answer: The median salary package offered to the students after finishing B.Pharma from DIT University - Admission Office is INR 750,000. While, the Median package offered by PES University after completion of B.Pharma is INR 730,000. Basis these stats, DIT University - Admission Office is better option compared to PES University on the Median salary parameter.

description: PES University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

PES University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 656 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 700 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at PES University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 656 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 239, while in 2023, it was 575.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

PES University accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 6056 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 5241, in the General All India quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: PES University Bangalore Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

data: 100 Feet Ring Road, BSK III Stage, Bangalore (Main Campus)
Separate hostels for girls and boys
Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Auditorium, Research centres, Medical services, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

reviews.review_heading: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are quite excellent, including Wi-Fi for all and a specialised library for law. 
The quality of the hostel is also nice, but the food is not so much appreciated in the canteen, and it takes a lot of time to get prepared. 
There are quite a few sports games like football, basketball, badminton, etc. Including the top infrastructure courts for each sport.

reviews.review_heading: Completely worth a one-time investment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

reviews.review_heading: You will experience every feeling in this college, good placements, and good friends.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a fine infrastructure with high-speed Wi-Fi and a well-built library to study with all kinds of books. A well-maintained canteen, well-facilitated sports field, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: PES: The real reason why to join PES.
reviews.review_text: The campus life, infrastructure, and both indoor and outdoor places are really well-maintained and well-equipped. This is one of the attractions at PES, where we get to see a huge block just for indoor sports and other co-scholastic activities. Here at PES, students get to play sports whenever they want, there are separate fields for different outdoor sports. One of the most attractive being is the cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private university, but the fee is too high.
reviews.review_text: For first-year students, the hostel is not on campus, but from the second year, the hostel is on campus. The Wi-Fi in both the college and the hostel is good. Facilities in the college are also good. The food is of good quality and quantity. Everything mentioned above is available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Worthy for course but not for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and aesthetically pleasing. To sit and study we have quite big libraries and Wi-Fi is available but sometimes it is a trouble to connect with them. Moreover, we have a boys hostel inside the college campus and a girl's hostel outside the campus which is contact based and it is taken up by a living space company, for girls hostel which includes food and snacks for the hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with infrastructure and faculty, bit disappoint and concerned about placements.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, our college has the best facilities. They provide us all we need, including a study area. We have four different libraries, including one exclusively for the law department, which has a collection of even rare books. There is also a three-storied central library and an international-level moot court hall. We have courts for basketball, volleyball, badminton, and tennis, with a highly structured gym facility for students. There are six canteens that provide clean foo...

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements, Great Exposure, but Super Difficult Exams.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty much okayish, not so good I would say because I have seen my friends complaining about the hostel food and all, and also they are building a new hostel now. Wi-Fi, sports, and games are always there, but unfortunately, I am not in the hostel, so I don't know what exactly is happening there.

reviews.review_heading: Not what I expected it to be.
reviews.review_text: The college provided good classroom and lab facilities. The hostel rooms are decent compared to other hostels. There are four canteens on the campus, and the quality of the food is good. The campus is clean and huge. We have small stalls for snacks and stationery inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: PES University at Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: PES University is a wide university including a lot of courses. Specialized lecturers are appointed for all the courses. A higher area is allocated for parking and sports courts. The library, with an extensive collection of books by various authors, was arranged in the college library.

reviews.review_heading: Slightly expensive for studies.
reviews.review_text: Students from different places come here to study, but there is no partiality or discrimination among them. The main aim of the college is to showcase the talents and skills of the students and help them succeed in their careers. But I'm not okay with the hostel food, so I would give it four stars.

reviews.review_heading: NammaPesu: An Honest Take.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in our college. We have ample space for parking, playing cricket, football, and pretty much every outdoor sport. We also have 3 cafeterias, as well as a hospital upcoming in our campus itself. There is also a dedicated room for yoga, as well as a gym room.

The university also conducts student exchange programmes and faculty exchange programmes. The faculty at PES University Bangalore are diploma, PhD, and degree holders. The university also invites guest faculty for various lectures and events.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's not just the hype, it is in reality, the world's the biggest AYURVEDA college and hospital.

content.Placements: Almost all students were placed after graduation, and they get 5 lakhs to 13 lakhs of package per annum by companies like Dabur, Jiva Ayurveda, and other hospitals. 100 precent of the students got one-year mandatory internship in the hospitals. The roles offered are doctor, professor and researchers etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure includes a central library, an auditorium, a canteen, theatre halls, labs, museums, girls' hostel, boys' hostel, a hospital block, a world's the largest herbal garden and last but not the least, fully furnished classrooms and a separate playground for cricket, football, Kabbadi, volleyball, and a table tennis hall.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good for students.

content.Placements: Placements were very good. Most of the students either crack UPSC or opt for AIAPGET exams for MD. Internships were also offered at this college. The average stipend ranges between Rs 15,000 per month to Rs 23,000 per month.

VIT Vellore admissions 2026 are open. Find below other recent updates:

college_info.intro:
The popular courses at VIT Vellore are its BTech, MTech, and MBA programmes. These courses are covering areas like Engineering, Management, Science, Commerce, and Architecture, etc. The UG programmes offered at the university include BTech, BCA, BArch, BBA, BDes, etc. The PG programmes offered are MTech, MDes, MBA, MSc, etc.
While the BTech CSE and MBA are in demand courses for the career opportunities and high salaries that they enable, while VIT MTech remains popular for its Research. VIT Vellore is also known for its BTech programme as it has a group of experienced faculty members from not only India but abroad as well. Students can check more information about the same in the table below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students get substantial industry exposure
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    The placements are going on for the Class of 2025. As of now, a total of 11140 students of batch 2025 of courses like BTech, MCA, MBA, etc., have been placed in reputed companies. The key highlights of VIT Vellore placements for the Class of 2025 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2025)the highest packageINR 100 LPANo. of companies visited868Total students placed11140Total offers14044Super dream offers3563No. of dream offers3499Note: The above mentioned data are the combi
faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at VIT Vellore?

faqs.answer: A:    As on April 4, 2023, the participating recruiters offered 125 job offers to the MBA batch 2023. The highest package offered during VIT Vellore MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 15 LPA. As of April 4, 2023, a total of 904 recruiters participated during VIT Vellore placements 2023. Tabulated below are the 2023 placement statistics for MBA course:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2023)No. of companies visited904No. of students placed14,345No. of super dream offers4,461No. of dream offers3,453th
faqs.question: What is the salary for VIT MBA placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, it is true that VIT Vellore is well known for offering placements to almost all the students.In 2025, 868 recruiters visited the campus and offered 14044 job offers to the students. The highest package achieved stood at INR 1 Cr per annum. The students of the batch 2025 secured 3563 super dream and 3499 dream offers from the recruiters.
faqs.question: Does everyone at VIT Vellore get a decent placement?

faqs.answer: A:    A total of 14044 offers were made in 2025 including 3499 Dream, 3563 Super Dream and 6982 Regular offers from 868 participating companies. The highest package offered during VIT Vellore placements 2025 stood at INR 1 Cr per annum.
faqs.question: How are the VIT Vellore placements in 2025?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for VIT Vellore BTech ranges between INR 4.9 lakh and 7.8 lakh. The total course fee, includes a caution deposit of INR 3,000 as well. The fee will vary as per the specialisation selected by the candidates. BTech is available in 24 specialisations, namely Computer Science and Engineering (Bioinformatics), Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Biotechnology, Chemical Engineering, etc. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 1350.
faqs.question: What is the fee of VIT University BTech course?

faqs.answer: A:    VIT Vellore offers a BTech programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode and is approved by the AICTE. The total tuition fee of BTech at VIT Vellore ranges between INR 6.9 Lacs and INR 8.3 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the fees for 4 years BTech tuition at VIT Vellore?

faqs.answer: A:    There are multiple components included in the fee for VIT Vellore courses, such as hostel fees, tuition fees, security deposits, etc. VIT Vellore MBA fees structure 2024 is mentioned in the table below:Fee ComponentsAmount (2 years)Tuition feesINR 6.97 LakhOne-time paymentINR 3,000Total feeINR 7 LakhNOTE: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at VIT Vellore?

faqs.answer: A:    VIT Vellore tuition fee for a four-year BTech range between INR 4.9 Lacs and INR 7.8 lakh as per official sources. Candidates after final selection are required to pay the course fee for seat confirmatin. In case a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Apart from tuition fee, the total fee is also inclusive of hostel fee, security deposit, etc. Moreover, the application fee for BTech courses is INR 1,350. It is a non-refundable amount.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the good infrastructure and good placements.

review_content.Placements: So, coming to the placements in BCA, the eligible CGPA for placements is above 8. If 9, it is better as about 94 percent of students get placed, as the recruiter company conducts its own exam to get into their company. The package offered ranges from 3-7 LPA for the BCA course. The college will not provide internships. We have to search for internships. The top role offered is developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. In VIT, all students will have the same facilities that will not differ. Our college infrastructure is a very good place to study. It will provide Wi-Fi only in the library. Hostels have their specific range, like single person per room, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 8 sharing rooms. The hostel fee may vary, and for 7 days, they will provide different kinds of food in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Companies hire for R&D roles.

review_content.Placements: Major offers for exceptional roles like research and development are provided by companies like Schlumberger, 3M, and GE Appliances, considering the invite card of our college for recruitment drives. Two kinds of packages are offered by a few companies for the top and lower roles. Some other core companies like Hitachi Energy and Intel also participate in the drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: Leave intimation, on-duty, and other emergencies require the intimation of the parents. Otherwise, we are not allowed anywhere. Transportation modes like the college bus and public transport such as bus, auto, and cab are available frequently. Mini stationery is available for students to purchase randomly needed things to avoid frequent movement outside the institution.

review_summary.college_name: VIT Vellore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of VIT Vellore.

content.Placements: The current IT Batch is good with comparatively less number of students than other branches. Around 80 percent of students get placed, while others choose to go for higher education. The highest package offered in the IT branch is 53 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but it is capped at a particular speed and shuts down at 12:30 AM. Overall, the infrastructure is good. It is equipped with gyms, basketball courts, and other sports amenities. Students have to choose the hostel and a mess every new year themselves. Hostels are allotted based on our branch rank.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best decision of my life.

content.Placements: Placements are more than 90 percent. The internship percentage is also more than 90 percent. Top recruiting companies offering are Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Visa, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the library and every hostel block, with a pretty good internet speed. Hostel blocks are not less than heaven. There are very clean washrooms and there is no crowd in the washrooms in the morning or during peak hours, too. Food is also great, and the mess serves a variety of options to eat for students. Cybersecurity courses are offered and labs are equipped with the latest technology.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the good infrastructure and good placements.

content.Placements: So, coming to the placements in BCA, the eligible CGPA for placements is above 8. If 9, it is better as about 94 percent of students get placed, as the recruiter company conducts its own exam to get into their company. The package offered ranges from 3-7 LPA for the BCA course. The college will not provide internships. We have to search for internships. The top role offered is developer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. In VIT, all students will have the same facilities that will not differ. Our college infrastructure is a very good place to study. It will provide Wi-Fi only in the library. Hostels have their specific range, like single person per room, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 8 sharing rooms. The hostel fee may vary, and for 7 days, they will provide different kinds of food in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Companies hire for R&D roles.

content.Placements: Major offers for exceptional roles like research and development are provided by companies like Schlumberger, 3M, and GE Appliances, considering the invite card of our college for recruitment drives. Two kinds of packages are offered by a few companies for the top and lower roles. Some other core companies like Hitachi Energy and Intel also participate in the drives.
content.Infrastructure: Leave intimation, on-duty, and other emergencies require the intimation of the parents. Otherwise, we are not allowed anywhere. Transportation modes like the college bus and public transport such as bus, auto, and cab are available frequently. Mini stationery is available for students to purchase randomly needed things to avoid frequent movement outside the institution.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: 80% of students who got an opportunity to sit in placements are placed. Placements are decent at VIT Vellore. The package varies from 4 LPA to 1.02 CPA. It depends on the skill set of the student. Top recruiting companies include Microsoft, Google, Goldman Sachs, Benz, and many more. VIT lacks internship opportunities. The top role offered in the CSE core is a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very well-maintained by the VIT team. Classrooms are very well-maintained with projectors installed in every class. The labs are built with proper equipment and are loaded with ACs. Hostels are well-maintained and well-furnished. The mess food varies from hostel to hostel. VIT has excellent sports facilities, as it contains 3 gyms, 3 basketball courts, and many more facilities.

admission_overview.title: VIT Vellore Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: VIT Vellore's admission is based on the entrance exam for the majority of the courses. The institute conducts VITEEE for BTech., VITMEE for MTech and VITREE for PhD admission. For VIT Vellore admissions, students need to appear for the accepted entrance tests. The final selection may require students to go through other selection rounds including a Personal Interview. The admission criteria generally involve an online application, an entrance exam, shortlisting of candidates, counselling and document verification, followed by fee payment to secure a seat. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the admissions and eligibility of the VIT Vellore.

eligibility_selection.title: VIT Vellore Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026

Admission is conducted through the university's entrance exam. VIT University Vellore also accepts national/ state-level entrance exams for admission to a few of the remaining courses.
