courses_data.description: Vellore Institute of Technology offers a full-time MBA course of a two-year duration. Candidates must either appear for the VIT Business School Entrance Examination (VITBEE 2026) or submit a valid scorecard of CAT / XAT / MAT. Students also have to appear for PI.

faqs.question: How to get VIT Vellore MBA admission?
faqs.answer: The institute shortlists candidates for MBA course based on national-level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, GMAT, CMAT, NMAT or ATMA. The shortlisted aspirants are further required to come for the PI round. Vellore Institute of Technology will also consider the academic performance and work experience of the candidates for final selection. Candidates who have passed regular, full-time UG/ Integrated degree from a recognised institute/ university of at least three years of duration with a minim

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA at VIT Business School Vellore?
faqs.answer: VIT Business School admisison for MBA entrance exams like CAT, XAT, MAT. It also considers personal interview and academic merit. Work experience works as an added advantage during the final selection. Candidates are evaluated based on eligibility, entrance exam scores and their performance in PI rounds.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is a two-year course divided into four semesters. Vellore Institute of Technology offers MBA in six specialisations, namely Finance, Marketing, Business Analytics, Human Resource Management, General Management and Production and Operation Management. MBA course is designed with a Curriculum for Applied Learning (CAL) and executes in a trimester pattern with a Fully Flexible Credit System (FFCS). Students can avail of credit transfer options to foreign universities and foreign internship

faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA in VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: VIT Vellore MBA tuition fees, including the first and second year, are INR 7 lakh. Students who are selected in the MBA admission process have to pay the course fees. The admission of the student will stand cancelled if he / she is unable to pay the fee within the specified time. Also, students have to pay the registration fees. VIT MBA registration fee is INR 1,200. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment modes.The information is taken from the website of VIT Vello

courses_data.name: VIT Vellore MTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: VIT Vellore offers a full-time MTech for a duration of two years at the PG level. VIT Vellore offers MTech in different specialisations. Some of the specialisations include Construction Technology and Management, Mechatronics, Structural Engineering, and more.VIT Vellore MTech admissionsare entrance-based. Students have to appear for the VITMEE exam followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the details related to VIT Vellore MTech programme:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to M.Tech at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: The VIT Vellore M.Tech admission process is completely entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on VITMEE exam, which is conducted at the university-level by VIT. Students need to qualify the exam to proceed to further selection rounds. The shortlisted candidates are offered final admission based on their performance in PI round.

faqs.question: What is MTech course structure at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: The institute offers a full-time MTech in different specialisations of Engineering. A few of the top specialisations include Computer Science and Engineering, VLSI Design, CAD/ CAM, Biotechnology, Automotive Electronics, and Manufacturing Engineering, among others.

faqs.question: What is a good score in VITEEE?
faqs.answer: Students with 65-75 marks out of 120 will have a fair chance of getting admissions through VITEEE 2023. The cutoff for admissions will be prepared based on various factors related to the entrance exam. However, it is to be noted that only those candidates who secure a rank of up to 1 Lacs will be eligible for admissions into VIT Vellore and Chennai campuses. Those students with a rank above 1 Lacs will be able to apply for admissions into the VIT Andhra Pradesh and Bhopal campuses.

courses_data.name: VIT Vellore BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: VIT Vellore via its VIT Business School (VIT BS) offers a three-year full-time BBA programme at the UG level.VIT VelloreBBA course is designed with the Curriculum Applied Learning (CAL) method, which facilitates the completion of professional certificates such as ACCA along with the respective degree. The course curriculum of this programme is distributed among six semesters of six months each, which also includes soft-skills training. Find below the details related to VIT Vellore BBA programme:

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in BBA at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: BBA admission at VIT University is merit-based (based on aggregate obtained by eligible candidates in previous qualifying degree/ exam). The shortlisted candidates are called for a counselling (virtual or physical) round. The final admission to BBA course subjects to merit list preparation based on cut off decided by VIT Vellore as per seat availability.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to VIT Vellore BBA course?
faqs.answer: No, the institute shortlists candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. After completion of the selection rounds, the institute releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. The shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay a VIT Vellore course fee to confirm their seat at the institute. Candidates must pass Class 12 with at least 65% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST and others) with Commerce /A

faqs.question: Does VIT Vellore offer BBA?
faqs.answer: BBA is a three-year course offered at the UG level. Candidates must pass Class 12 with at least 65% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST and others) with Commerce /Accountancy /Book Keeping and Accountancy /Mathematics /Business Maths & Statistics /Business Studies /Business Management /Business Economics /Economics as one of the subjects in the qualifying examination to apply for theBBAcourse. Additionally, the institute shortlists candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aft

faqs.question: What is the required score in VITEEE to get admission in VIT, Vellore for CSE or ECE?
faqs.answer: For that in the non-core branches, you have to secure under 50k rank and if you want to take admission in core branches then you have to secure under 10k rank. For CSE, you have to score under 1k and for ECE under 5k rank.

placement_report.college_name: VIT Vellore Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: VIT Vellore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: VIT Vellore is conducting the placement drive for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, 868 recruiters participated during VIT Vellore placements 2025 and presented 14044 job offers to the students . The highest package offered stood at INR 1 Cr per annum . The students of the batch 2025 received 3563 super dream and 3499 dream offers from reputed companies. TCS has made the national record by offering 4004 placements to the batch 2025. The top recruiters who visited the Vellore Institute of Technology campus in 2025 include Mircosoft, Amazon, Oracle, Dell, PayPal, Cisco, Bank of America, etc.

According to the the unofficial online sources, the VIT Vellore CSE avearge package secured by BTech batch 2025 stood at INR 8.13 LPA . The median package secured by the BTech CSE batch 2025 was INR 6 LPA. A total of 315 CSE students secured the salary of more than INR 20 LPA. Some of the top hiring recruiters for CSE batch 2025 include Cognizant, TCS, Infosys, Accenture, etc.
Check out more on VIT Vellore placements in the video below:

tables.context: What is the placement scenario at VIT Vellore?

faqs.question: Is it true that all students get good placements at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: VIT Vellore has a strong record of placements for courses like BTech, MCA, MBA, etc. In 2025, VIT vellore recorded the highest package of INR 1 Crore per annum which is nearly 14% higher from INR 88 LPA offered in 2024. A total of 14044 offers were made including 3499 Dream, 3563 Super Dream and 6982 Regular offers from 868 participating companies. The name of the few top recruiters include include Mircosoft, Amazon, Oracle, Dell, PayPal, Cisco, Bank of America, etc.

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: The placements are going on for the Class of 2025. As of now, a total of 11140 students of batch 2025 of courses like BTech , MCA , MBA , etc., have been placed in reputed companies. The key highlights of VIT Vellore placements for the Class of 2025 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2025) the highest package INR 100 LPA No. of companies visited 868 Total students placed 11140 Total offers 14044 Super dream offers 3563 No. of dream offers 3499 Note: The above mentioned data are the combined data of all the 4 VIT Campuses.

faqs.question: How are the VIT Vellore placements in 2025?
faqs.answer: A total of 14044 offers were made in 2025 including 3499 Dream, 3563 Super Dream and 6982 Regular offers from 868 participating companies. The highest package offered during VIT Vellore placements 2025 stood at INR 1 Cr per annum.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at VIT Vellore placements?
faqs.answer: The VIT Vellore highest package offered during the 2025 placement drive stood at INR 1 Cr per annum LPA. Earlier, the highest packages offered to the batch 2024 was INR 88 LPA. Gong back to 2023 placements, it was NR 1.02 Cr per annum.

faqs.question: Is VIT Vellore a good option for pursuing MBA regarding placements and study?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is one of the most popular courses of VIT Vellore in terms of placement opportunities. The VIT Vellore MBA placement details are yet to be released for the Class of 2025. However, the highest package offered to the MBA batch 2023 was INR 15 LPA. A total of 105 recruiters participated at VIT Vellore in 2023 and placed students.

faqs.question: What is the average placement package for MBA at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: The average package offered during VIT Vellore MBA placements 2025 is yet to be released. Meanwhile, check out the VIT Vellore MBA average package offered in 2023 form the table below: Particulars Statistics (2023) Average Salary INR 9.68 LPA

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at VIT Vellore?
faqs.answer: There are multiple components included in the fee for VIT Vellore courses, such as hostel fees, tuition fees, security deposits, etc. VIT Vellore MBA fees structure 2024 is mentioned in the table below: Fee Components Amount (2 years) Tuition fees INR 6.97 Lakh One-time payment INR 3,000 Total fee INR 7 Lakh NOTE: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, VIT Vellore has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, VIT Vellore fell 2 ranks to #21 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, VIT Vellore fell 4 ranks to #14 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, VIT Vellore fell 5 ranks to #16 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Research Institutions' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, VIT Vellore fell 1 rank to #14 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VIT Vellore.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, but it is capped at a particular speed and shuts down at 12:30 AM. Overall, the infrastructure is good. It is equipped with gyms, basketball courts, and other sports amenities. Students have to choose the hostel and a mess every new year themselves. Hostels are allotted based on our branch rank.

reviews.review_heading: Best decision of my life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the library and every hostel block, with a pretty good internet speed. Hostel blocks are not less than heaven. There are very clean washrooms and there is no crowd in the washrooms in the morning or during peak hours, too. Food is also great, and the mess serves a variety of options to eat for students. Cybersecurity courses are offered and labs are equipped with the latest technology.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. In VIT, all students will have the same facilities that will not differ. Our college infrastructure is a very good place to study. It will provide Wi-Fi only in the library. Hostels have their specific range, like single person per room, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 8 sharing rooms. The hostel fee may vary, and for 7 days, they will provide different kinds of food in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Companies hire for R&D roles.
reviews.review_text: Leave intimation, on-duty, and other emergencies require the intimation of the parents. Otherwise, we are not allowed anywhere. Transportation modes like the college bus and public transport such as bus, auto, and cab are available frequently. Mini stationery is available for students to purchase randomly needed things to avoid frequent movement outside the institution.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very well-maintained by the VIT team. Classrooms are very well-maintained with projectors installed in every class. The labs are built with proper equipment and are loaded with ACs. Hostels are well-maintained and well-furnished. The mess food varies from hostel to hostel. VIT has excellent sports facilities, as it contains 3 gyms, 3 basketball courts, and many more facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Life at VIT Vellore is full of memories.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are top-notch. Students need a good rank or a roommate with a good rank to choose better hostel blocks and rooms. Food in Vellore is not bad, and some caterers like SRRC and Darling are very good. For sports and games, there are both outdoor and indoor stadiums inside the hostel area.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the facilities they provide, and the teachers are teaching very well.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in the hostel, and the infrastructure is very good in VIT. The library is the best. Hostel facilities are so good, and the food is served very neatly. We have an ambulance for emergencies. We have badminton in our hostel. The hostel is very good, and the hygiene is very good. They have laundry also.

reviews.review_heading: VIT - Vellore, Tamil Nadu review.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are well furnished, and all necessary equipment like an almirah, wardrobe, table, bed, and chair are there. Classrooms are also loaded with the facilities that are required, and they keep us available as soon as possible. Food quality is impressive as they give both veg and non-veg options on the menu. Games and sports are there in bulk, most of the international player comes from this college only.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and campus life are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. I took the H Block hostel apartment type; it is costly but very spacious. Wi-Fi is good, and the food is also good. We have a health center within VIT with a medical shop, and we have a basketball court, badminton court, and all to play. The mess is also neat.

reviews.review_heading: Vellore Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was very beautiful. All blocks had good infrastructure. College only provides Wi-Fi. Labs were very helpful. In library there were all these types of books. Hostel rooms were good and also hygiene food. In total five canteens were there. Good medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Vit Vellore course review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the lab and classes is good. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. In library it is available. The hostel facilities are good and the food is also good. If you're interested in sports, there is a chance you can play, and they give first preference to health in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, good ROI of CAT 1, 2, and strict rules.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good in my college. Library with many books. Wi-Fi is decent, but only in the library and hostels. There are AC and non AC rooms available, and the room you get depends on your CGPA or your roommate CGPA. Food is sometimes good, sometimes not, depending upon what mess you take. We have a volleyball, gym, a tennis table, table tennis, a basketball, a swimming pool, and a big ground for football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Well maintained campus and great environment to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: The Computer Science department is one of the largest in VIT and hence has been provided with the best facilities, such as well equipped classrooms with smart boards and internet connection. The rooms are large and spacious. The library here is not only big but also has a wide range of books available on every topic necessary. They even have self serving kiosks, which can give us an idea of where the book is present. The hostel is well equipped, and they have good Wi-Fi, good food, AC, and non A...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by VIT Business School, Vellore Institute of Technology, VelloreReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: VIT University: A place that you cannot miss in your lifetime.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are air-conditioned and smart classrooms, with projectors and speakers, and arch classrooms with rolling chairs. Every room is equipped with Wi-Fi facilities. All the hostel rooms are highly maintained, and AC and non-AC rooms are available. All the rooms in the hostel have Wi-Fi connectivity. You have different types of mess options like veg, non-veg, and special.

reviews.review_heading: Vellore Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is also good and is full of greenery, which gives fresh air, and hostels are also good on our campus. Every floor contains a speed Wi-Fi network, and classrooms are clean and neat, with well-maintained food in hostel that is healthy and of good taste.

college_info.college_name: VIT Vellore

data.description: VIT Vellore is famous for its top-notch faculty. The professors and associate/assistant professors are dedicated to teaching and research among students. The teaching staff comes from prestigious academic backgrounds across institutions. Students feel free to approach the professors as they are empathetic to their queries.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about VIT Vellore

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Wipro, Microsoft, AppDynamics, DE Shaw, Udaan, Cloudera, and Amazon visit our college for placements.
Top roles offered were software engineering, backend development, frontend development, site reliability engineering, android developer, and IT consultant.
VIT provides the excellent placement opportunities for CSE department college students.
In core CSE/IT and even non-core branches, students get placed in top MNCs with good packages and learning experience.
Students got lots of opportunities for their developing skills and experience an internship offered by some reputed companies.

likes.text: The library is another strong point of the college which has the abundance of resources.
The hostel rooms present here are also decent and equipped with all the major facilities.
The college provides a variety of sports facilities like football, cricket, badminton, volleyball, handball, hockey, basketball, tennis, table tennis, etc.
There is no doubt that VIT has one of the best infrastructure possible with every academic building divided by different courses which creates from better environment for studies.
They have well-built academic buildings with classes and labs with all the required equipment.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The faculty members in the campus are highly qualified Drs And PhDs in their respective courses.
The course curriculum is great, and the FFCS ( fully flexible credit system) system allows you to choose your course, teachers and slots according to your convenience.
The semester exams are not very tough but contain a vast syllabus, So to perform well in the exams you must study well throughout the semester.
We have qualified teachers, and they are knowledgeable, But I feel that they don't teach in a proper way.
Teachers in our college are very helpful, and they try to provide us with maximum practical knowledge.

likes.text: I choose this course because I always wanted to become a computer engineer and VIT has one of the best computer engineering faculty around here.
Overall, VIT is the best institute for students to get placed, have fun, enjoy college life, and involve themselves in extracurricular activities.
GraVITas is the technical fest and Riviera is the cultural fest organized by VIT and thousands of students from other colleges like IITs, NITs, BITS, MIT, etc.
The college organises lots of extracurricular activities, and students who are interested can participate.

college_info.college_name: VIT Vellore Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Each year, Vellore Institute of Technology offers scholarships in the form of tuition waivers and freeships. While merit scholarships are awarded to class toppers, economically challenged students are provided need-based financial assistance. Furthermore, NRI and foreign students are given scholarships upon presenting meritorious records. Students from rural backgrounds who secure top ranks in VITEEE at the district level (in Tamil Nadu only) are given free education.

Students who wish to pursue MTech are also given scholarships, given that they score well in the GATE exam. In addition, scholarships are given to students who excel in sports and games. Financial assistance is also provided to students who wish to do their project work in partner universities and institutions abroad, under the Semester Abroad Programme (SAP). In order to encourage the students to pursue active research, VIT also awards appropriate research associateships to meritorious and needy students.
DFP-Banner
Although scholarships at VIT Vellore are based on need and means, a majority of scholarship schemes offered at the institute level are mainly merit-based.
Merit
Scholarship*
Toppers of Central/ State Board
100% tuition fee waivers
VITEEE rank holders from 1 – 50
75% tuition fee waivers
VITEEE rank holders from 51 – 100
50% tuition fee waivers
VITEEE rank holders from 101 – 1000
25% tuition fee waivers
*The scholarship/ fee waivers range is for four years.
Students applying for admissions at VIT Vellore (enrolled in BTech/ BDes) will have to pay the below-mentioned amount per year (after deduction of scholarship amount).
VIT Vellore fee structure (after deducting scholarship amount)

Eligible students with meritorious records in State/ Central board examinations or VITEEE rank holders will be required to present marksheet/ copy of marksheet or VITEEE scorecard along with all the other relevant documents while applying. For more information, students can visit – https://vit.ac.in/.

college_info.intro:
The popular programmes offered at UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology are BPharm and MSc. The college offers these courses to students for 4 and 2 years, respectively. These courses are offered across several specialisations like Nutrition & Dietetics and Microbiology. BPharm students can work as Community Pharmacist, Hospital Pharmacist, Clinical Research Associate, Regulatory Affairs Specialist, Quality Control Analyst, Pharmaceutical Sales Representative, etc. These courses emphasise through partnerships with GE Healthcare, hands on, research driven learning to address growing healthcare demands.
Under this programme, the university offers students exchange opportunities with Taipei Medical University (Taiwan), Providence University (Taiwan), and Airlangga University (Indonesia). MSc graduates can take roles of clinical dietitians in hospitals, helping patients manage their health through personalised dietary plans. Below are some of the UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology courses, their respective eligibility, and fees:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology provides various courses to students at UG and PG levels. The college mainly offers courses in streams such as Engineering, Design, Science, etc. AT the UG level, the college offers various courses such as BPharm, BTech, BSc, etc. These courses are offered in full-time mode and across several specialisations such as Biotechnology, Biomedical Engineering, Food Technology, Microbiology, Clinical Research, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology (Pharmaceutical Biotechnology) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best place to study is between the hills of Dehradun.

content.Placements: Out of the 6 students participating in the placement drive, 5 receive offer letters. The packages range from 5 LPA to 10 LPA. One of the companies is Merck. The top roles offered after the course are lab technician, lab assistant, and researcher.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are very nice. Both hostel rooms and classrooms have a good internet connection. There are two types of hostel rooms which are triple sharing with common washrooms and double sharing with attached washrooms. The hostel campus has multiple cafes offering a variety of food options.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Nutrition and Dietetics (Dietetics and Holistic Wellness) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My memorable journey of UPES.

content.Placements: M.Sc. nutrition and dietetics always have less placement there are very few companies that hire us in campus drives. Other course like BE, MBA, and BCA have great placement, but only 12 companies come for recruiting. Steadfast nutritions, Apollo hospital, Abbott, VLCC healthcare, habit health, and health are companies. Salary after course is 3.6 to 4.8 LPA. In every company, we need to work as interns for first 6 month after performance roles are given. nutritionist profile is among top.
content.Infrastructure: College has two separate campuses as It's small because it's situated in a mountainous area. There is always a parking issue; space is very limited. College classrooms are very special. The library is also big, and books are arranged properly. One library is always available for service in exams; it is open the whole day. Hostel rooms are triple-sharing; there are common washrooms and bathrooms. The mess floor is very average, not good at all. The hostel feels very high, so it is not worth it. The time is very early (8 p.m.).

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology (Food Biotechnology) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent experience, but fees do not seem worth it sometimes.

content.Placements: The batch I am currently enrolled in is the third batch in our course. The first batch of our course is passing out this year and so far, the placements provided by the college have been disappointing. Since it is our first batch, it does make sense that their placements would not be at high-paying jobs; still, it is concerning for younger batches as the ROI is very low. I hope this will change soon. Most of my seniors have already been or have chosen to pursue post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: One of the best things about UPES is the infrastructure of the Bidholi campus. Students are provided with a well-equipped library with a vast variety of reference books on almost every topic to study from. The classrooms of newer blocks are well furnished and functional; holder blocks lack some of this but the university is working on renovating many of these old classrooms. The Wi-Fi is a bit unreliable, as not everyone is able to properly connect with it and it does not always provide a good connection. I am not an on-campus hosteler so I am not that knowledgeable about situations within hostels.

admission_overview.college_name: UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology Admission process 2025

paragraphs: School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES admission 2025 is open for its offered courses. TheUniversity Of Petroleum And Energy Studiesoffers more than 100 PG, UG, and, Doctoral courses via its eight schools, includingSchool of Advanced Engineering,School of Computer Science,School of Design,School of Business, etc. Among the schools,School of Health Sciences and Technologyis well known to offer admission to BPharm, BSc, BTech, MSc, and PhD programmes.

School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES admission is based on multiple entrance exams, Board Merit, and personal interviews. For BTech, the school accepts the national-level exam JEE Main or the university-level entrance exam that is conducted by UPES University:UPESEAT (University of Petroleum & Energy Studies Engineering Aptitude Test). As for the rest of the courses the school accepts admission based on the board merit and personal interview. Adding on, UPES PAT 2024 (Pharmacy Aptitude Test) is another entrance exam conducted by the University for admission to the BPharm course.

ForSchool of Health Sciences and Technology courses, admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Eligible candidates can apply by visiting the UPES Dehradun's official website. and by selecting the School of Health Sciences and Technology offered courses. Tabulated below are the eligibility criteria and accepting entrance exams forUG, PG, and doctoral-level programmesfor School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES course admissions 2025:

School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES admission is based on board merit, entrance exams, and personal interview. Candidates with valid national-level entrance exams are also eligible for admission. The admission procedure for all the UG and PG courses is as follows:
Step 1: Application Process

School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES has a multi-step application process. To apply for the programme, candidates must apply via the University of Petroleum and Energy Studies official website. They have to get enrolled on the university's website and choose the desired course from the schools.
Step 2: Entrance Exam and Personal Interview

Candidates will receive SMS regarding further admission procedures based on selection criteria. Details for the Entrance Exam / Personal Interviews will be sent, wherein candidates are required to register on a preferred date and time slot.
Step 3: Entrance/Interview results
Candidates will receive the result of the entrance exam and interview via SMS or they can also check it in the official website of the University.
Step 4: Seat Finalisation

After completion of the selection round, the university releases a provisional offer letter that is issued based on the entrance exam and interview. Candidate must pay the admission fee to reserve/block their seat before the expiry date of the admission offer.

faqs.answer: The cost of MSc at School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES is around INR 3.54 lakh. The fee is taken from various sources hence indicative. Candidates might have to pay one time fees at the admission. The fees might include components other than hostel fee, which will be included in the admission fee. Additionally, candidates have to pay one-time payment of Security Deposit, Alumni Fee and Identity Card fees ofINR 22,000.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MSc at School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have bachelor's Degree in BSc with Biology, Biotechnology BSc, Pharma etc. eligible for MSc at School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES. Candidates must fill the online application form by visiting the official website of the school. After the that screening of application & interview will be conduted.

faqs.question: What is the qualification for BTech in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES?
faqs.answer: School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES offers BTech at a UG level. Admission is offered via the UPES Dehradun admission. BTech/ BTech (Hons) course is based on national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CUET, etc. The university also conducts UPESEAT for providing admission to BTech course. It is an online exam conducted for a duration of 2 hours. Check below the complete admission criteria for BTech course of UPES Dehradun:School of Health Sciences & TechnologyExamination PathwayNon-Examination PathwaySelection criteria:JEE Main/ CUET UG/ UPESEAT/ SAT India (minimum of 50 percentile)Eligibility:Passed Class 10 and Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate and a minimum of 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, Maths/ Biology, and English in Class 12Selection criteria:Merit-basedEligibility:Class 10 and Class 12 with at least 75% aggregate and a minimum of 75% aggregate in Class 12 Physics, Chemistry, Maths/ Biology and English

faqs.question: Is it difficult to get admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology Courses, UPES - Experience Centre?
faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun offers admission to most of the courses based on entrance exam scores. Candidates have to appear for the university or national-level entrance exam for admission. UPSEAT conducted by the university is competitive due to limited seats and large number of applications. Aspirants who prepare well can pass the entrance test.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES?
faqs.answer: Admission to School of Health Sciences and Technology is both merit and entrance-based. UPES Dehradun conducts its own entrance exams like UPES PAT UPESMET UG UPES PAT UPESEAT etc. UPES also accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, NEET etc. for admission to courses in School of Health Sciences and Technology.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BPharm course at UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology?
faqs.answer: UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology offers BPharm course to students at the UG level. It is offered for 4 years in several specialisations. To be eligible for BPharm at School of Health Sciences and Technology UPES, candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the college. Further, candidates seeking admission to the BPharm must be Class 12 passed with minimum 50% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry, Biology / Mathematics, and English as a Major Subject.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Pharm from UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, students with BPharm degrees are eligible for various government jobs. BPharm graduates can apply to work as Pharmacists in government hospitals, clinics, and other public healthcare facilities. Other than this, students can also seek out Regulatory Affairs roles in government agencies such as the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation and others. Tabulated below are more job roles for BPharm graduates to pursue: Government Jobs After BPharm TSPSC Drug Inspector MPSC Pharmacist SBI Pharmacist ESIC Pharmacist Railway (RRB) Pharmacist OPSC Drug Inspector

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Tech from UPES SOHST?
faqs.answer: Yes, a BTech degree enables students to pursue government jobs. Students with a BTech degree can seek job opportunities at reputed government companies such as Indian Railways, ONGC, BHEL, ISRO, and others. Fresh graduates are generally offered entry-level titles such as Research Assistant, Jr. Developer, Software Engineer, Quality Analyst, and such. The starting salary for engineers in the public sector ranges from INR 4 to 6 LPA . Interested students can even take government exams such as UPSC, SSC, etc., to broaden their career horizons.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities available after completing BSc Clinical Research course from UPES School of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Completing a B.Sc. in Clinical Research from the UPES School of Health Sciences and Technology opens diverse career paths in the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and healthcare sectors. Graduates are primarily trained to handle the design, execution, and management of clinical trials for new drugs and medical devices. The names of the jobs are: Clinical Research Associate (CRA) Clinical Research Coordinator (CRC) Clinical Data Manager (CDM) Pharmacovigilance (PV) Specialist Regulatory Affairs Specialist Medical Writer

facilities: Visit the official website of the University.
Click 'Apply Now' on the home page of the website.
You will be directed to the online application form page. Fill the fi

reviews.review_heading: The best place to study is between the hills of Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are very nice. Both hostel rooms and classrooms have a good internet connection. There are two types of hostel rooms which are triple sharing with common washrooms and double sharing with attached washrooms. The hostel campus has multiple cafes offering a variety of food options.

reviews.review_heading: My memorable journey of UPES.
reviews.review_text: College has two separate  campuses as It's small because it's situated in a mountainous area. There is always a parking issue; space is very limited. College classrooms are very special. The library is also big, and books are arranged properly. One library is always available for service in exams; it is open the whole day. Hostel rooms are triple-sharing; there are common washrooms and bathrooms. The mess floor is very average, not good at all. The hostel feels very high, so it is not worth it. ...

reviews.review_heading: Very good Allied Health Sciences Courses .
reviews.review_text: School of Health Sciences has a beautiful view of the mountains with a bright and cheerful atmosphere. The labs are spacious and are able to host a variety of experiments. Hostel has clean washrooms, along with a good mess hall providing healthy food. There are good Wi-Fi connections along with both outdoor and indoor gaming facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My life at UPES was filled with joy and fun.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a very good infrastructure facility in the campus. The surrounding environment is also very good, giving the students a very close vibe to the nature. You get excellent hostel facilities with good food and a canteen which provides food 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: Decent experience, but fees do not seem worth it sometimes.
reviews.review_text: One of the best things about UPES is the infrastructure of the Bidholi campus. Students are provided with a well-equipped library with a vast variety of reference books on almost every topic to study from. The classrooms of newer blocks are well furnished and functional; holder blocks lack some of this but the university is working on renovating many of these old classrooms. The Wi-Fi is a bit unreliable, as not everyone is able to properly connect with it and it does not always provide a good c...

reviews.review_heading: College needs to work on many things.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great at the college but for the hostel, it's a nightmare. The rooms are depressing, it's a mess, and it serves food that is in horrible condition many times. Work is required on this part. Games and sports are good to average but improvement can be made.

reviews.review_heading: UPES review for the upcoming years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is really great, with proper Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, and a big food court. The quality of hostel living and their food quality are really awesome, but the hostel has 3 beds in one room, which is not very comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library, classrooms, Wi-Fi, laboratory, toilets, ground, basketball field, volleyball field, cafeteria, food court, general store, and infirmary. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Health Sciences, UPES.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. They provide sports facilities. A scholarship facility is available in our college. Medical facilities are good. Our college has an infirmary where MBBS doctors and all facilities are available. Our food court serves good quality food, which includes everything.

reviews.review_heading: Best college I have ever seen .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our department is nice and the course structure is very good. Wi-Fi facility is good. Quality of facilities in the hostel is very good. Sports activities are available. Food in the mess is quite good. A canteen in also their in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of academics and cultural activities.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the hostel is very good. The food is fine. The rooms are also good. They provide the best facilities ever. The hostel fee is Rs. 180000 per year. They also provide the best medical facilities for students. There is a tuck shop.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very great with opportunities in all fields and work.
reviews.review_text: Comfortable and reasonable campus hostel with access to all the required items. B.Ed, bathroom, Cupboard, Tubelights, Study Tables, Wi-Fi, Good Food, Access to library 24/7 campus sports grounds, and all other basic needs. In cases of emergency, there are doctors and nurses placed.

reviews.review_heading: I really have very good and amazing
reviews.review_text:
I have good hostel  exprience there.
They provide free wifi in hostel .the labs are very well developed, each and every equipment was present over there.
Moreover, the mess and hostel canteen provides food of good quality. They always gave us fresh food .

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Everything is average in this college. Laboratories are better. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are well-maintained. Hostels are average. Our campus is very beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: satisfied with the college
reviews.review_text: good infrastructure, nice environment libraries are neet and clean the food quality is also very good also the mess, canteen and mediical facilities are also good with good vibe and atmosphere and helps us in study and motivate us to perform good in the exam.

college_info.intro: AIIMS Kalyani popular programmes are MBBS and BSc. MBBS is the flagship programme of the institute offered for 5.5 years. MBBS students are trained with modern and advanced technology. After the successful completion of MBBS programmes, students could either pursue higher education such as MD, MS, or others. MMBS students can become Medical writers, Healthcare Informatics, Health Administrators, Medical Researchers, and others. Below mentioned are some of the popular courses offered by All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani and their respective eligibility and AIIMS Kalyani fees:

faqs.answer: A:    There are vast career options available for MBBS students. Students can work in hosiptals, governments armed forces, nursing homes, etc. Some of the popular job roles available for AIIMS Kalyani are mentioned below:Medical writersHealthcare InformaticsHealth AdministratorsMedical Researchers
faqs.question: What are the career options after MBBS from AIIMS Kalyani?

faqs.answer: A:    After completing an MBBS degree from AIIMS Kalyani, there are several career options available to graduates. Some common options include:Practicing medicine as a general practitioner or specialist in a hospital, clinic, or private practiceAppearing for the PG entrance at AIIMSMedical graduates can also go for UPSC Civil Services.A nationwide test is conducted by the Indian army to choose deserving candidates for Army medical officer posts.Students from Haryana, have the option to join Hary
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing MBBS from AIIMS Kalyani?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: AIIMS Kalyani West Bengali offers a Bachelor of Medicine Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS), BSc course at the UG level and MSc course at the PG level. The institute provides specialisation across various streams such as Biochemistry, Cardiology, ENT, Gastroenterology, Dentistry, Neurology, and others. Candidates who are willing to participate in their All India Institute of Medical Science Kalyani admission process must apply by filling out the application form before the last date of application.

faqs.answer: A:    The All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Kalyani in Saguna, Kalyani, West Bengal, India, offers 125 seats for the MBBS program. The programme is five years and six months long, including an internship.The reservation matrix for the MBBS programme is as follows:18 seats for scheduled castes9 seats for Scheduled Tribes32 seats for Other Backward Classes46 seats for the general categoryAIIMS Kalyani also offers 10 seats for MD/MS/MDS courses, various paramedical courses, and nursing programs.AIIMS Kalyani started its first academic session in the year 2019, with a batch of 50 MBBS students.
faqs.question: How many students can do a MBBS at AIIMS Kalyani?

faqs.answer: A:    Entrance-based admissions are given at AIIMS Kalyani. For MBBS, NEET UG is a necessary qualification conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA). NEET score of a candidate determines his admission, along with the MCC counseling process. Merit in NEET alone is the sole criterion for the admission process; there is no direct or merit-based admission provided to the students.
faqs.question: Are admissions at AIIMS Kalyani entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    No, the AIIMS Kalyani does not accept students who are not given an entrance exam. In AIIMS Kalyani, the MBBS admission strictly takes place on the basis of the NEET UG examination result. Students should clear NEET with the required cut-off and be part of the Medical Counseling Committee counseling to obtain admission. Direct admission or management quota seats are not provided in the institute.
faqs.question: Can students join AIIMS Kalyani directly without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    AIIMS Kalyani MSc is a 2 year programme offered in full-time mode at the PG level. The Institute offers MSc with various specialisations with admission offered on the basis of merit and accepted entrance exams. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation and valid scores in AIIMS PG examination for final admission. The total tuition fees of the course is INR 1.4 K.

overview_faqs.question: Is AIIMS Kalyani good for MBBS?
overview_faqs.answer: All India institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)Kalyani is one of the best college located in West Bengal. AIIMS, Kalyani offers a 5.5 years UG course including an internship. The infrastructure is good and well maintained. The college is recognised by the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Govt. Of India.This college is also officially approved under the Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY) in 2015.It's good college for MBBS in West Bengal

overview_faqs.question: How safe is the AIIMS Kalyani campus for students?
overview_faqs.answer: AIIMS Kalyani adheres to the solemn code of conduct and has committees associated with every ongoing act in the Institution. The infra involves various other places within the campus to accommodate every cultural event and achievement-worthy facility. AIIMS Kalyani grievance committee and discipline committee conduct 24/7 surveillance to keep the students safe and secure inside the campus as well as outside the campus.

review_summary.college_name: AIIMS Kalyani Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the campus life that AIIMS Kalyani offers.

content.Placements: All students undergo a mandatory rotatory internship. The amount is uniform for all AIIMS. After that, we have to give PG entrance exams to get admission in the PG branch of our choice. The payment there again varies. We get 30% internal reservations in our institution.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are well-equipped. They provide a single bed, a rotating chair, a table, a bed side table, and a bookshelf. Girls get single rooms from the first year itself, whereas boys get them after second year. The single rooms have attached washrooms also. Overall, the hostel facility is great. They provide gym facilities (indoor and outdoor), indoor game room, badminton court, volleyball, basketball court, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is very good, but the sports facilities need significant improvements.

content.Placements: All the students of the 2022 batch are entitled to a 1-year internship of around Rs. 30,000 with an appropriate stipend, during which they learn many clinical skills and the art of medicine. After that, we are eligible to take the PG exams and pursue our careers further.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very beautiful, with all the available classrooms and seminar rooms for lectures, along with a well-equipped laboratory for practical learning. However, the sports facilities are not satisfactory. The quality of food in the mess is also questionable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani.

content.Placements: There are 125 students in a batch, with a rank of 2100, score of around 700 in 2024. MBBS course is offered in college along with B.Sc. nursing. Paramedics are also there. Everyone gets internships in college after completing the final year, and then degree certification is done.
content.Infrastructure: College has library, best AC classrooms, laboratory facilities with all the instruments and machines. They also have sports ground, mess library, reading rooms, guesthouse, and everyone is equipped with Wi-Fi. Hospital is well-equipped and everything starts in OPD.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Why choose AIIMS Kalyani - All India Institute of Medical Sciences.

content.Placements: The total strength of a batch is 125. Everyone has to do a compulsory internship for one year after the course for which a stipend is also given. After the internship, one can practice as an MBBS doctor in any government or corporate hospital or pursue higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: AIIMS provides world-class classrooms and laboratories along with modern equipment and accessories. The hostel is of top quality as compared to any other medical college. The library is also very nice, and one can access the resources even from their devices.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall experience in AIIMS Kalyani.

content.Placements: The placement thing doesn't exist in medical college. You have to do a mandatory internship of 1 year after passing the final year. In AIIMS, the stipend for the internship is 30k/month. Everyone gets a job after graduation. The average salary for a fresher ranges from 8-10 Lacs per annum. In central institutes or Delhi, it is 1.2 Lacs per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch. We have Wi-Fi in our classrooms, canteen, library, and hospital building. Labs are fully equipped with state-of-the-art facilities. The central library has all the necessary books and online access to journals. The hostel you will get is mostly a single room with an attached washroom equipped with a geyser. The room is well-furnished. The mess is common for boys and girls, and the food is decent. We have a cricket ground, football ground, basketball court, indoor badminton court, table tennis, chess, and carrom board.

For other courses, applicants can visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to obtain the necessary information and submit their applications.
AIIMS Kalyani Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Eligibility

While others need to be paid semester-wise. Find belowAIIMS Kalyani Feefor its MBBS course:

Students are offered seats based on merit obtained by them in NEET. Candidates must qualify for the entrance exam and register for the counselling for seat allotment. Find below-mentioned table below contains theAIIMS Kalyani seat intakefor its MBBS programmes:

TheAIIMS Kalyani admission processbegins with NEET UG registration followed by appearing for the exam-specific counselling process and then final seat allotment for the shortlisted students. The step-wise AIIMS Kalyani admission process is mentioned below

Step 3:Post the final seat allotment, candidates who want admission can submit the fee and confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Are admissions at AIIMS Kalyani entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Entrance-based admissions are given at AIIMS Kalyani. For MBBS, NEET UG is a necessary qualification conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA). NEET score of a candidate determines his admission, along with the MCC counseling process. Merit in NEET alone is the sole criterion for the admission process; there is no direct or merit-based admission provided to the students.

faqs.question: Can students join AIIMS Kalyani directly without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, the AIIMS Kalyani does not accept students who are not given an entrance exam. In AIIMS Kalyani, the MBBS admission strictly takes place on the basis of the NEET UG examination result. Students should clear NEET with the required cut-off and be part of the Medical Counseling Committee counseling to obtain admission. Direct admission or management quota seats are not provided in the institute.

faqs.question: Is there any way of applying offline for the AIIMS Kalyani application form?
faqs.answer: No. In AIIMS Kalyani, applicants do not apply offline. All of the admissions are done through online application by registering for NEET UG examination that is conducted prior to the MBBS course. Participants will have to register on the website of the NTA and complete the online counseling process organized by the Medical Counseling Committee, MCC. Make sure you are doing everything online and make sure that you get in before the deadlines end.

faqs.question: Can I get into AIIMS Kalyani with 800 rank in NEET?
faqs.answer: AIIMS Kalyani accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for various categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the overall cutoff range fell between2276and2417. Hence, yes you can getAIIMS Kalyaniwith a NEET rank of 800. However, please note that other categories, rounds, etc., will have different cutoff ranks.

description: AIIMS Kalyani cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS Kalyani NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 2417 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS Kalyani MBBS cutoff 2025 was 2417 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 4442 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS Kalyani accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS Kalyani INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 179 to 14405 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Radio diagnosis, with a lowest cutoff rank of 179. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Microbiology, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Radio diagnosis, MD in Paediatrics and MD in Emergency Medicine, with Round 3 closing ranks of 179, 440 and 1516, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS Kalyani B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 1815 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 1597 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 3873 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS Kalyani cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff range among the General AI category was between 34 and 851.

There is a central library, which is truly huge, with separate cubicles for each student. There are 3 canteens and 1 student mess on campus. The hostels provided here...

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: AIIMS, as a central bank, has world-class infrastructure; there is no doubt. Classrooms and LTs are well furnished. All the labs are well-equipped with modern appliances and well-qualified technicians. The library is also very nice; it provides research papers and e-resources. One can even access the library from his / her phone / iPad. The whole campus has a very good Wi-Fi network except the hostels but one can set up his / her own Wi-Fi if needed. The hostels are well furnished. Mess provides...

reviews.review_heading: AIIMS Kalyani is the best in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best here. There are wide buildings with the best manpower. Sulabh workers are there to maintain the cleanliness of the hospital and the entire campus. The quality of food is average here and still needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is one of the best medical colleges one can study in.
reviews.review_text: The library is just awesome, with all the medical books you'll need, and the classrooms are fully AC with projectors. Hostels are well-furnished; we've been provided with a room with a B.Ed table, chair, and a wardrobe for keeping clothes. The toilets are clean and very well maintained. I would really suggest you guys join our college.

review_summary.college_name: SVKM's BNCP Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Bhanuben Nanavati College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: The college has top-notch recruitment services. Students are placed in good companies such as Cognizant, Centaur Pharma, Indoco Labs, Rubicon, IQVIA etc. The number of students placed in both Bachelor's and master's is good enough. The placement officer is very supportive.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available are quite well-organised for students, be it computer room services, library, admin office, classrooms and laboratories. The classrooms have digital boards. The library has access to various scientific and non-scientific journals for literature search.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college worth its infrastructure.

content.Placements: There is a placement cell in our college, but it was not up to the mark. Companies like Dialhealth, Abbott etc. visited our college, but not more companies visited as it was not reached our expectations. Salary package would range from 2.5 to 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: According to infrastructure, it was one of the best colleges in Mumbai. It was best in terms of classrooms, library, sports and facilities. The quality of the labs was excellent. The canteen was normal, but it is huge, so all the colleges could accommodate. There are spacious classrooms, corridors, labs, library and common rooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Overall, my experience at this college was amazing.

content.Placements: Placements of the college have been consistently improving considering the departments like clinical research, drug regulatory affairs, product formulation and product management. The companies offered a good variety of roles to students through on-campus placements. An increase in the number of companies visiting the campus will ensure dream jobs to any pharmacy graduate. Almost 100% of the students secure an internship and a job through the campus placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Labs are fully equipped, and the library has a wide variety of books across different specialisations. Medical facilities are always available on the campus. In the common rooms, there are many indoor games like table tennis, carrom board and chess that students often indulge in. Canteen available on the ground floor is catered by Aditi fast food. The quality and taste of the food are amazing. It's one of the top-ranked canteens in Mumbai.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and worth joining. However, it could be improved to be much better.

content.Placements: 100% placements are provided by our college, but the packages offered by the companies were very low. The highest salary offered to my batch was Rs. 18,000 per month while the students of other colleges were offered a salary of more than Rs. 30,000 per month. This made me wonder that the ROI of other colleges is better than the ROI of our college as the fee structure of our college is high (in lacs) while the fee structure of other colleges is few thousands.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is decent. The campus is very small. The library is small and it is shared with other colleges also. Labs are decent. Classrooms are good, but they are given on rent to the students of other colleges who leave them dirty. Food provided in the canteen is tasty but a bit expensive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Best College For Pharmacy in terms of Overall Development for the Pharma Industry.

content.Placements: The Placements provided are fine. Students get opportunity to apply into good MNC. The College also has a Placement Cell for this. The College Placement Cell gets companies for the campus placement. The number of opportunities are increasing every year.
content.Infrastructure: If there's one thing SVKM is know for is it's infrastructure. All the facilities provided are Classes Apart. The infrastructure is amazing and the students get the best of facilities throughout. AC classrooms to well-equipped Labs and a library full of required study material. Students never fall Short for any references.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: National Institute of Ayurveda offers a wide range of programmes at UG and PG levels. review_content.Placements: Almost 85 Percent students get placed. Most students have got their placement within a very short time. NIA has produced lots of Medical officers who have been working all over India. This is a medical College so, The 1-year internship is included with your course. This is the one of the finest colleges of the world.
review_content.Infrastructure: This is very good. You will get a very good library facility, You will have access to more than 1 Lacs books in the library with the latest research and journals from all over the world. The hostel is very good, but there is no possibility to get a hostel for the 1st-year students. The accommodation is very good but less. According to your exam marks NEET the authority will be allotted your seat. Obviously, Home distance is countable. NIA has a variety of foreign student collections. The canteen is good. There is a badminton court and a Central field. You will have access to lots of sports activities. The lab facility is very good. Countries one of the finest labs is in NIA. The classroom is very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60- 70% of students get jobs in the Government or Private sector. Mainly Government vacancies and Private college lectureships offered by students. Some private companies like Dabur, Patanjali, Jiva, and many more are offered. Package around government sector around 10-12 LPA and private sector 3-8 LPA. The internship is compulsory for every student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are quite well. Mainly Anatomy, Physiology, and Pathology labs. Classroom well furnished and projector and air-conditioner establish in the room. Wi-Fi is also available on the campus. There are 17 different departments available. Well-managed library. Even I see the best library of course available only in NIA. The hostel is good. Games and cultural activities always happen once a year like a fest.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good choice for students who want to pursue B.A.M.S.

content.Placements: I am a 2nd-year student at NIA Jaipur, and I must say the college has a very good reputation among government B.A.M.S. colleges in India. The best thing is that students get good clinical exposure, as the hospital of NIA is the top Ayurveda hospital in Rajasthan. Students also get a good amount in stipend compared to other government colleges.
content.Infrastructure: It has decent infrastructure, experienced and well-qualified faculty, and a well-stocked library and laboratory. The only problem is that students don't get hostel accommodation in the 1st year and also face difficulty in the 2nd year to get a hostel. The hostels are good with all facilities, but you have to stay outside in a PG or flat for approximately 2 years before being able to get a seat in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The best Ayurveda college in India.

content.Placements: Because it's a medical course, students don't directly get placed in various companies, but the marks one scores throughout the course are the basis of selection for the post of medical officer. If someone wants to get a job just after graduation, other than that, most students pursue a PG, which can be done at the same college, but admission is based on an entrance exam, i.e., on a merit basis. 100% of students get an internship opportunity during the last year of the course, where a stipend of $25,000 is paid to each and every student. The top roles offered in the course are medical officers, government jobs, research officers, and dieticians. You can also work with world health organizations or start your own clinical practice. The average package after completing B.A.M.S. is 10 LPA.

faqs.answer: A:    IES University mainly provides admission on the basis of merit, so there is no need for any university-level entrance examination for the majority of courses. Certain courses may need scores in national-level exams. The applicants should check the official IES University website for changes. The majority of UG and PG courses are dependent on marks of Class 12 and graduation.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam at IES University?

faqs.answer: A:    To seek admission to BTech in IES University, students should have passed Class 12 with 45% marks. Merit and counselling are the selection criteria. Students interested in applying need to apply through the official site of the university.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at IES University?

faqs.answer: A:    For eligibility at IES University's MBA, candidates should have a graduation degree with a minimum 50% of marks. Admission is strictly merit-based, and counselling is done afterwards. No entrance exam for admission to IES University's MBA course is necessary.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at IES University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can enroll in IES University after Class 12 if you are eligible. The courses for pass-outs of Class 12 include BTech, BBA, BPharma, and BCom. You should have a minimum of 45% marks to qualify for UG programmes. Admission in IES University is merit-based along with counselling.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college has helpful and good faculty members, placements are average, and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 2-3% of students got placed in a company. The package is approximately 3 - 5 LPA. There are no fixed companies for placements. Many companies come as per their requirements. The top role offered in our course is in development and some DSA knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. There is another building offered for our department no other one can enter in our department from another department. The lab conditions are good. Many systems are available in our lab to practice our problem and improve our coding skills. The classroom facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good, but can be better. More & more involvement from the media industry should be brought to table.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for my course in our college because the batch size is very small and very few people show interest in our courses. The internships are not provided from the college side, but we can do internships at the places we want with the letter approved by our HOD.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. We have access to our studios and libraries, and the editing rooms are available for us. The students are allowed to use the digital equipment available in college, and we are allowed to cover events and do photography and videography.

review_summary.college_name: IES University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has a big campus but an average faculty. No placements in Agriculture, and limited student life.

content.Placements: For B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture at IES University, there are no direct placements from this department. Most placements happen for engineering and management students, where companies visit the campus. In Agriculture, students usually prepare for government exams like ICAR or banking jobs, or go for higher studies. Some students also look for private sector jobs on their own in agri-based companies. Internships are very limited and mostly arranged by students themselves through personal contacts. If students choose this course, they should not depend on campus placements but focus on their own career options after graduation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and placement. To be honest our college is the best.

content.Placements: 50% of students placed last year. There are many companies on campus, and approximately 60-70% of students get internships from the college most of the students are placed by the internship, and even internship which is provided by the college is also paid.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel life is much better than I had imagined. Classrooms and library are also good and peaceful even the sports faculty and facilities are provided by the college on the next level. Every month sports events are organized by the university and other teams.

The lab conditions are good. Many systems are available in our lab to practice our problem and improve our coding skills. The classroom facilities are also good.
