individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good or bad things about the college, but this is actually a good college & you can enjoy your life.

content.Placements: This college unnecessarily increases the fees and harasses students by the college management and workers. Approximately 10% of students are placed in companies by the college campus. 50% of students are interested in the college campus. Then the rest of the students collect their degree and go back home.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. The quality of labs is low. My classroom in college is good, like average. The college library is excellent. It has a quiet and relaxing feel for studying. The hostel is not good. I stayed in the college hostel for only one year. The environment is fully green. The facilities for sports and games are crowded.

admission_overview.college_name: IES University Admisssion 2025: CUET, Process, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: The IES University Admission 2025is open now. They collectively offer undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in the fields of Engineering, Commerce, Humanities, Management and Sciences. The university also offers PhD courses. Admission to all the UG and PG courses atIES Universityis merit-based. Students seeking admission to IES University must apply through its official website.

The university offers more than 20 full-time courses. The mode of application to apply for any of the offered programmes is both online and offline. Below are the key highlights forIES University admissions:
Particulars
IES University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

IES University coursesoffer UG, PG, and various other courses to students. These courses are provided across Commerce, Management, Science, and various other streams.IES University course admissionsare merit-based/entrance-based. Candidates must fill out the form as the applications are currently open. Find below the Eligibility and selection criteria for the variousIES University courses:
Graduation with 50%
Class 12 with 45%
IES University admission process includes registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in IES University:
STEP 1: IES University Application Process 2025

Candidates must download the application form from the official website of IES University. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.
STEP 2: Selection
IES University shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The college evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates must pay theIES University course feeto confirm their seat in the college.

headings.text: IES University Admission Process 2025: Eligibility & Selection

courses_data.name: IES University BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CUET, CBSE 12th, ISC, MPBSE 12th
courses_data.description: IES University provides a BTech course in different branches of engineering with a practical learning and industry-oriented approach. Admission is based on merit, with a minimum of 45% marks in Class 12. The course imparts technical and problem-solving skills needed in engineering professions.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at IES University?
faqs.answer: To seek admission to BTech in IES University, students should have passed Class 12 with 45% marks. Merit and counselling are the selection criteria. Students interested in applying need to apply through the official site of the university.

faqs.question: What specialisations are offered in BTech at IES University?
faqs.answer: IES University provides BTech courses in major areas of engineering like Computer Science, Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering. The courses provide hands-on laboratory training and industry-oriented training. These specializations equip students for technical positions in various industries.

courses_data.name: IES University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IES University offers a full-time MBA programme with the goal of creating managerial and leadership skills. The program is merit-based and requires candidates to have at least a graduation degree with 50% marks. The MBA program includes modern business education through experiential learning, industry interface, and career guidance.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at IES University?
faqs.answer: For eligibility at IES University's MBA, candidates should have a graduation degree with a minimum 50% of marks. Admission is strictly merit-based, and counselling is done afterwards. No entrance exam for admission to IES University's MBA course is necessary.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA admission at IES University?
faqs.answer: IES University does not hold any individual entrance exam for admissions to MBA. There is a process of selection based on academic achievements and success in the counselling round. Candidates need to apply through the official website of the university for initiating the process.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA from IES University?
faqs.answer: An MBA from IES University provides career opportunities in finance, marketing, HR, and operations. The course has practical exposure and soft skill development. Placement assistance is also provided by IES University to enable students to get suitable job positions.

placement_report.college_name: IES University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: IES University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: IES University has a placement cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placement cell is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, mock interviews, and specialized training sessions.

IES University concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during IES University placements in 2024 stood at INR 21 LPA . Further, over 250 recruiters participated in 2024 placements and offered handsome packages to the students of the 2024 batch. More than 50 recruiters offered the package of INR 5 LPA and above. Additionally, the highest stipend offered during the recent internship placements stood at INR 5 Lakh per month. The top recruiters of IES University in 2024 included Muthoot Finance, Genpact, Hitachi, Amazon, Glenmark, Cipla, India Today, TCS, ITC Infotech, etc.
Note : The placement year is not mentioned on the official website. Hence, the placement data mentioned above is assumed for the year 2024 .

hostel_campus.college_name: IES University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Extra Tuition Classes, Sports, News Paper in every Rooms, Digital Classes, Library are provided in the hostel.
Two, Three and Four-seater rooms are available.

Extra Tuition Classes, Sports, News Paper in every Rooms, Digital Classes, Library are provided in the hostel.
Two, Three and Four-seater rooms are available.

reviews.review_heading: It has a big campus but an average faculty. No placements in Agriculture, and limited student life.
reviews.review_text: I am studying B.Sc.(Hons.) in Agriculture at IES University, Bhopal. The infrastructure for our course is decent. Classrooms are spacious with projectors, and the seating is comfortable enough. The library is big with a fair collection of books and journals, though agriculture-specific material could be improved. Wi-Fi is available across the campus, but sometimes, the speed is slow. Labs and experiential farms are provided for agriculture students, which help in practical learning. However, the...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and placement. To be honest our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life is much better than I had imagined. Classrooms and library are also good and peaceful even the sports faculty and facilities are provided by the college on the next level. Every month sports events are organized by the university and other teams.

reviews.review_heading: The college has helpful and good faculty members, placements are average, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. There is another building offered for our department no other one can enter in our department from another department. The lab conditions are good. Many systems are available in our lab to practice our problem and improve our coding skills. The classroom facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good, but can be better. More & more involvement from the media industry should be brought to table.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. We have access to our studios and libraries, and the editing rooms are available for us. The students are allowed to use the digital equipment available in college, and we are allowed to cover events and do photography and videography.

reviews.review_heading: Good or bad things about the college, but this is actually a good college & you can enjoy your life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. The quality of labs is low. My classroom in college is good, like average. The college library is excellent. It has a quiet and relaxing feel for studying. The hostel is not good. I stayed in the college hostel for only one year. The environment is fully green. The facilities for sports and games are crowded.

reviews.review_heading: If you have talent then you should be away from this college otherwise most welcome .
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are available. The facilities provided in the hostel are good; they provide a bed, study table, and locker, but the quality of food in the mess is the worst. In my opinion, consider a paying guest accommodation. Canteen and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college; the admission and office work are very bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good; there are many facilities available in our university such as a library, all labs, and some smart classes, but not all classes are smart. The hostel facilities are good; they are well-maintained and always neat and clean. The mess in the university is not good because the food is not well-prepared for students.

reviews.review_heading: In IES university, there is a very big issue with the fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Faculty is very good in the civil engineering department. Infrastructure like the classroom is average, the library and labs are quite good, and wi-fi is not available for students. Mobile phones are restricted on college campuses. Drinking water is not drinkable and not available 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: It’s my humble request to students not to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good; classrooms are average, but no labs or library services are provided to students. Canteen food is good. Medical facilities are also available to the students, but no sports or games are available to the students. Games are only allowed if one takes part in any tournament.

reviews.review_heading: This is an honest review of the B.Sc. B.Ed. dual degree program from a girl's perspective.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good, all equipped as smart classes with projectors, smart boards, and traditional chalkboards. LAN Wi-Fi is available in all departments throughout the college. The Wi-Fi speed is slightly low but sufficient for studying from YouTube. The library and labs are not up to par. The library is small and sometimes runs out of stock of curriculum books. Hostels are quite good with all amenities available at an affordable rate; there are three hostels in total, two for boys and one ...

reviews.review_heading: Integrated B.Sc. and B.Ed. Dual Degree Course Review.
reviews.review_text: All the labs are well-furnished and equipped with the latest equipment. The Computer Science department lab is the best lab on campus. It has been made in collaboration with TCS ION Digital. It is said to be one of the best labs among Bhopal city's colleges. The library is decent, with only curriculum books present there. Seating places for those who want to sit and study are also available, but the library is not big enough to handle all the crowd. Classrooms are new with modern furniture; ther...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that provides good placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our department are good. All the facilities are provided in our course such as free internet for studying, a library, classrooms, labs, and very good quality hostels. It has a ground to play games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IES University.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has more than 5 buildings, 2 canteens, 2 libraries, many computer labs, mechanical lab, civil lab, accounting sector, etc. Our college provides specific branches like pharmacy, diploma, hotel management, B.Tech in engineering, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has friendly teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. A library is available. Sports facilities are available. Living spaces are clean. Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is clean. A canteen is available. It is an excellent campus in Bhopal. Hostel facilities are excellent. All classrooms are equipped with smart boards, which makes learning more interactive and engaging. They are essential for conducting experiments and practical work.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering students but not for management and other fields.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is excellent. We have clean classrooms and labs as well as libraries. Canteen food is also healthy and it gives many varieties of fast food. They have two basketball courts, a football ground on the campus, separate department buildings, etc.

college_info.college_name: IES University

data.description: IES University campus offers several facilities to the students and caters to all their needs. The institute has state-of-the-art infrastructure which includes designed classrooms, cafeteria, auditorium, etc. The classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with digitalized technology to facilitate comprehensive learning. The college campus is surrounded by greenery all around and provides a safe and creative environment for students to enhance their skills. Apart from this, IES University Bhopal offers transportation facilities to students and faculty members to free them from the mental tension of travelling. The campus has several facilities available for students such as a common canteen, playground, conference rooms, etc.

college_info.intro:
Bangalore University provides UG, PG, integrated, doctoral and diploma courses in various streams like Engineering, Science, Law, Commerce, Teaching & Education and Humanities & Social Sciences. All these programmes are offered via the main campus of Bengaluru university, JB campus, PG Centre Ramanagar and other affiliated colleges affiliated with it.
The popular programmes at Bangalore University include B.E./ B.Tech, MBA/ PGDM, and B.Sc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bangalore University provides undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma courses in Law, Engineering, Humanities, Commerce, Science, Management, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BBA, BSc, BCA, BCom, and other programmes. At the PG level, the university offers MSc, MBA, MCA, MCom, MA, and other courses offered to the students. Admission at Bangalore University are based on the merit obtained in the qualifying exam as well as the course-specific entrance exam. Further, the Bangalore University courses are offered to students in full-time mode. Below mentioned are the along with the eligibility criteria and :

faqs.answer: A:    To take admission in UG courses, students must clear Class 12 from a recognised board. Final selection is made on the basis of the entrance examination conducted by the university or merit in Class 12. For PG courses, candidates need to have a valid bachelor’s degree in the relevant field from Karnataka University or an equivalent university. It is also imp that the students has passed the qualifying examination with the required aggregate as prescribed by the authorities. Further, the final selection criteria vary from course to course.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has a good education system.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good. Many companies will come for a placement drive. Many have been selected in the placement drive and secured their first job in fields such as HRM, marketing, sales, and digital marketing. However, it ultimately depends on your skills, confidence, and the way you communicate.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious. There’s proper ventilation, and hygiene is maintained in the washrooms too. We have a library, and it's very useful. Wi-Fi is only for the staff, not for students. There are science labs, an electronics lab, a mathematics lab, and a computer lab. There's also a canteen; overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews_list.review_title: Facilities are not good in our college.

review_content.Placements: No companies came for placement. Only a few came, and they were low-level companies. Guess what, college bought an agency for providing us placement for 2 LPA. Better to join somewhere else, at least those which provide placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Don’t know about hostel, but friends are staying, and it is like a pure jail, no freedom. Also, the infrastructure as of now is very average. New buildings are not good. Currently, new buildings are constructed, but as of now, it’s very average.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee structure of Bangalore University for the MSc programme?
course_faqs.answer: The total course fee for the MSc programme at Bangalore University ranges between INR 10,000 and INR 5.6 lakh. The university offers a two-year full-time M.Sc. course across 25+ specialisations. The following table mentions the seat and eligibility criteria for a few popular MSc specialisations: MSc SpecialisationSeat IntakeEligibility CriteriaApplied Genetics12BSc graduates with at least 40% aggregate for all subjects and 50% aggregate in all optional subjects with any three of the following su

course_faqs.question: Is the Bangalore University MSc admission fee refundable?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Bangalore University allows admission cancellation within the 10 days of counselling. Candidates have to get in touch admission office for the same. Some documents such as an original provisional admission card, fee receipt, and an application for cancellation and refund with correspondence address have to be submitted for the procedure. The fee shall be refunded after the successful submission of the procedure.

review_summary.college_name: Bangalore University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Above average and decent college, value for money.

content.Placements: The placements are decent, but most of the roles are catered to Computer Science students, so there is a dent in placements for Data Science in particular. Top roles often offered being AI/ML engineers, software testers, etc., and if you are good with coding, then it will work for you.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, but a point to note is that the Wi-Fi does not always work and the network is often very slow in the campus buildings, otherwise, the campus, classrooms. Labs are good, and there are canteens around the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good workflow and connectivity across the city.

content.Placements: I am studying BCA at Presidency College, which is a good college in Bangalore. 30 percent of students got placed last year in our course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Companies like Accenture, Flipkart, IBM, etc., hire students. The placement record of the college has significantly improved over years. There is a very good placement record among all the other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that great. It is a small college. The college does have Wi-Fi and hostel facilities. The college is doing well in sports and games in recent years and offers a variety of different games for every individual who has different interests in many things.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Management (BBM) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has a good education system.

content.Placements: Placements are good. Many companies will come for a placement drive. Many have been selected in the placement drive and secured their first job in fields such as HRM, marketing, sales, and digital marketing. However, it ultimately depends on your skills, confidence, and the way you communicate.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious. There’s proper ventilation, and hygiene is maintained in the washrooms too. We have a library, and it's very useful. Wi-Fi is only for the staff, not for students. There are science labs, an electronics lab, a mathematics lab, and a computer lab. There's also a canteen; overall, the infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Facilities are not good in our college.

content.Placements: No companies came for placement. Only a few came, and they were low-level companies. Guess what, college bought an agency for providing us placement for 2 LPA. Better to join somewhere else, at least those which provide placements.
content.Infrastructure: Don’t know about hostel, but friends are staying, and it is like a pure jail, no freedom. Also, the infrastructure as of now is very average. New buildings are not good. Currently, new buildings are constructed, but as of now, it’s very average.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Cyber Security - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of the Cyber Security department at UVCE.

content.Placements: About 95 percent of students got placed from our department last year. Top companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, and Tech Mahindra come for recruitment. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the average package offered is 4.5 LPA. The university provides 100 percent internships in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our course are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available in the class and labs. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel, but with limited data. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped with AC. The hostel and mess food are adjustable. A paid canteen is also available. Medical facilities are available all the time.

admission_overview.college_name: Bangalore University Admission 2026: Fee, Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Bangalore University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Bangalore University admissions are mainly entrance-based. The university offers courses at UG, PG, and Diploma levels. These are offered in the fields of Management, Science, Arts, and Commerce. Some popular courses offered at Bangalore University are BTech, BSc, BCom, MA, MBA, etc. Students can submit national or state-level entrance test scores for admission. Accepted exams include KCET, JEE Mains, CAT, XAT, CUET, and more. The university offers over fifty five programmes. All these are offered by the main campus of Bangalore University, JB campus, PG Centre Ramanagar and other affiliated colleges. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for the university.

eligibility_selection.title: Bangalore University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: To get into Bangalore University courses students need to ensure that they clear the preset eligibility of the desired programme. The university accepts CUET, KCCET, AIFD WAT, KMAT, CAT, XAT, GMAT, NMAT, etc for admission to various courses. Bangalore University course admissions are subject to fulfilment of both the basic eligibility and selection rounds. The common eligibility is as below: Bangalore University UG admissions require students to complete Class 12 with relevant subjects

faqs.answer: To pass the Bangalore University MBA internal exams, candidates need to clear the theory exam and internal assessment. Candidate shall score a minimum of 35% aggregate in the university exam (25 marks out of 70 marks in the theory exam) and 40% aggregate (total of university exam and internal assessment) in each subject to pass a subject exam. paragraphs: Bangalore University admissionsbegins with an eligibility check followed by other rounds. Students have to complete application, selection, and admission confirmation. Interested students who meet the eligibility can follow the steps below to completeBangalore University admission process

Application Process 2026Students can apply for Bangalore University courses at its website. To apply, students have to submit the application form with the application fees. The process has to be completed before closing date. Only completed forms are accepted.
Bangalore University Selection Process 2026

The selection process for Bangalore University depends on the programme chosen. Only selective few programmes, such as MA, MVoc, etc accept merit-based admission. The university accepts valid scores obtained by candidates in the relevant national or state-level exams for other courses.
Students may have to attend other selection rounds, such as interview/ counselling depending on the programme.
Fee Payment and Admission ConfirmationThe shortlisted candidates will be accepted into the programme once they have paid theBangalore University admission feesand submitted the specified documents.

TheBangalore University fee structurevary as per the course picked by the students. It can include components, such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, caution deposit, exam fees, and more. The candidates must pay the programme fee in order to confirm admission. Some of these are one time payments. The others are charged yearly/ semester-wise.Check belowBangalore University feesfor some popular programmes:

The university offers the course across various specialisations.

faqs.question: Does Bangalore University have MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers two-year MBA course in a full-time and part-time mode. There are 74 colleges affiliated to the Bangalore University that offer this programme. Selection for this course is entirely entrance-based followed by counselling round. Aspirants much check eligibility criteria to ensure that they are eligible to apply for this programme. The seat intake and fee varies from one college to another.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA in Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: Candidates with a valid bachelor’s degree from a recognised university with at least 50% (45% for SC/ST and category-I candidates) aggregate are eligible to apply. The applicant must also be a Karnataka Student as defined by the Government of Karnataka from time to time. Moreover, the university follows the eligibility criteria prescribed by the Government of Karnataka. For the MBA (evening) course, the minimum eligibility is almost the same. Candidates can read the Bangalore University brochure

faqs.question: What is the duration of BSc course in Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: In the field of Science, Bangalore University offers a 3-year BSc along with an integrated BSc-MSc programme of five-year duration to the students. The UG-level course is offered in the streams of Design, Engineering, Humanities & Social Sciences, Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing, etc. For admission to course, it is crucial that the aspirants fulfil the min. eligibility requirements as prescribed by the university.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying BSc at Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: The fee for a 3-yearBSc in Bangalore Universityranges between INR 33,550 and INR 6.6 lakh. The given fee range is cumulative of courses available by the university on-campus as well as through its affiliated colleges, hence may vary. Students can visit the official site (bangaloreuniversity.ac.in) or the admission office for more info on the fee. Apart from this, students also have to pay an application fee to submit the form successfully.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BSc admission at Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BSc courses and the integrated BSc course is merit-based. Candidates are admitted based on performance in the last qualifying examination. The selected students may have to participate in the counselling round as well for seat allotment. After seat allotment, candidates have to submit some amount of the fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MSc in Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: For admission toMSc at Bangalore University, candidates must visit the official website of the University (bangaloreuniversity.ac.in). Admission to the two-year PG-level course is based on candidates' performance in the counselling round, conducted by the University. Candidates are shortlisted for counselling based on performance in the last qualifying examination. Before filling out the admission form, the aspirants must check the eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for MSc in Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: The seat intake varies from one college to another. As per the government regulations, some of the seats shall be reserved for the candidates belonging to reserved categories. faqs.question: Is it expensive to study MSc at Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: The total MSc course fee comprises several fee components such as tuition, admission fee, security deposit, and so on. Candidates have to pay an application fee in order to submit their application properly. MSc fees at Bangalore University range between INR 10,000 to INR 5.6 lakh. The fee mentioned here is from an unofficial source and is hence suggestive. Candidates are urged to contact the University's admission department for a detailed fee structure.

faqs.question: Is the Bangalore University MSc admission fee refundable?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bangalore University allows admission cancellation within the 10 days of counselling. Candidates have to get in touch admission office for the same. Some documents such as an original provisional admission card, fee receipt, and an application for cancellation and refund with correspondence address have to be submitted for the procedure. The fee shall be refunded after the successful submission of the procedure.

faqs.answer: There are 26 Bangalore University-affiliated colleges that offer MCA courses. faqs.question: Who is eligible for MCA in Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who fulfil the educational requirements as prescribed by the university become eligible for admission. For eligibility, the aspirant shall be a graduate with a valid BCA/BSc/BCom/BA degree and should have studied Mathematics as one of the subjects in Class 12 or at graduation. Candidates seeking admission to the MCA Lateral course, should have a degree in Science or applied Science (three-year) in computer applications/computer science/information technology or other computer-related

faqs.question: Can I do MCA without an entrance exam from Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: No, Bangalore University MCA admission is completely entrance-based. However, the University also offers direct entry to the six semesters of the MCA course. To be eligible for the lateral entry, candidates must have a degree in Science or applied Science of three-year duration in Computer Applications, Computer Science, Information Technology, or other computer-related areas. Aspirants can get in touch with the admission office for more details.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission in MCA at Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: Bangalore University offers a two-year postgraduate degree in MCA. The basic eligibility to apply forBangalore University MCA programmeis to pass graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university. Hence, those who have scored less than 50% in their Bachelor's are not eligible to apply for the course. However, the candidates can decide to pursue MCA in distance mode. Candidates can also go for one of the colleges offeringonline MCA courses.

faqs.question: What percentage is required for Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who wish to get admission to Bangalore University courses should have secured min. 40% to 50% aggregate in Class 12 or the last exam. The required aggregate depends upon the course. Moreover, for courses where admission is entrance-based, a good exam score is required. Bangalore University announces cutoff marks for each course. There are multiple factors affecting the cutoff marks. The main factors that are considered while releasing cutoffs are:Previous year cutoff marksTotal no.of participantsTotal no.of seats availableThe difficulty level of the entrance tests, read more aboutBU Cutoff

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility for taking admission in various UG and PG courses at Bangalore University?
faqs.answer: To take admission in UG courses, students must clear Class 12 from a recognised board. Final selection is made on the basis of the entrance examination conducted by the university or merit in Class 12. For PG courses, candidates need to have a valid bachelor’s degree in the relevant field from Karnataka University or an equivalent university. It is also imp that the students has passed the qualifying examination with the required aggregate as prescribed by the authorities. Further, the final selection criteria vary from course to course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for getting admission into REVA University, Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Aspirants can check below course-wise eligibility for REVA University:CoursesCommon EligibilityBTechPass PUC or Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with one of the subjects from Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology / Computer Science / Electronics / Technical Vocational subjects and obtained at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates)MBABachelor's degree in any stream or BE/ BTech with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates)MCAAny graduation degree (BE/ BTech/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc/ BCA, etc.) preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)BBAPUC or Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregateBAPass Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category)MTechBachelor's degree or equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)

placement_data.title: Bangalore University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: A total of 1,626 students got placements during Bangalore University placements 2024 as per NIRF report 2025. From the UG 5-year program, 50 students were placed with median salary of INR 8 LPA. There were 1,576 students who were from PG 2-year program and the median salary was 3.50 LPA.

description: Bangalore University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various UG and PG courses. Candidates can refer to the sections below to view the cutoff details for various accepting exams across different courses, rounds and categories. Further updates are below:

Bangalore University MBA Cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA/PGDM courses. As per the Bangalore University CAT Cutoff 2025 was 75 percentile for admission to MBA programme at ISBR Business School for the gender-neutral candidates.
Students can look at the table below to know the cutoff for various other exams, like NMAT, XAT, etc for various yearsm like 2025, 2024, 2023, and 2022.

Bangalore University accepts several national and state-level entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA courses. The university offers a list of MBA/PGDM courses via its affiliated colleges, such as Dayananda Sagar College of Arts, Science and Commerce, and M.S. Ramaiah College of Arts, Science, and Commerce, etc.
During the Bangalore University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025, the last-round cutoff rank for MBA was 18611 atFor detailed course

Bangalore University accepts CAT, XAT, MAT, NMAT and other national and state-level Management entrance exams for admission. Candidates seeking admission to the MBA course must refer to the table below to check out the important dates:

Candidates willing to take admission to Bangalore University's MBA, MCA, MCom, ME and MTech, etc. courses, can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise cutoff lists for several national and state-level entrance exams for admission.

Bangalore University KCET cutoff 2025 was released in which the cutoff for CSE stood at 5020 for the General AI quota. In 2024, the closing cutoff for the same course was 4723, while in 2023, the closing cutoff was 2929 for admission to the CSE course. According to the last three-year cutoff ranks, BE in the CSE course saw a significant decrease in its competition.

highlights.description: Bangalore University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #65 in the University category, and #26 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Bangalore University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Bangalore In 2025
Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Bangalore In 2025

nirf.description:
Bangalore University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Bangalore University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Bangalore University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Bangalore University climbed 16 ranks to #65 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Bangalore University fell 2 ranks to #26 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Bangalore University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Bangalore University's rankings in 'Asia' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, Bangalore University fell 180 ranks to #801 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Southern Asia' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Bangalore University fell 67 ranks to #254 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Kristu Jayanti UniversityReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Above average and decent college, value for money.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but a point to note is that the Wi-Fi does not always work and the network is often very slow in the campus buildings, otherwise, the campus, classrooms. Labs are good, and there are canteens around the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Presidency CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good workflow and connectivity across the city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that great. It is a small college. The college does have Wi-Fi and hostel facilities. The college is doing well in sports and games in recent years and offers a variety of different games for every individual who has different interests in many things.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Jindal First Grade College For WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college has a good education system.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious. There’s proper ventilation, and hygiene is maintained in the washrooms too. We have a library, and it's very useful. Wi-Fi is only for the staff, not for students. There are science labs, an electronics lab, a mathematics lab, and a computer lab. There's also a canteen; overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Christ Academy Institute for Advanced Studies (CAIAS)
reviews.review_heading: Facilities are not good in our college.
reviews.review_text: Don’t know about hostel, but friends are staying, and it is like a pure jail, no freedom. Also, the infrastructure as of now is very average. New buildings are not good. Currently, new buildings are constructed, but as of now, it’s very average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering, Bangalore UniversityReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of the Cyber Security department at UVCE.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our course are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available in the class and labs. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel, but with limited data. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped with AC. The hostel and mess food are adjustable. A paid canteen is also available. Medical facilities are available all the time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent placement support.
reviews.review_text: It has well-maintained classrooms with smartboards and a fully equipped library, wi-fi is a bit slow, and modern computer labs that support effective learning. It provides professions environment with seminar halls, project labs, well organized academic facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 14 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of International institute of Business Studies.
reviews.review_text: We have very good infrastructure and facilities like a library, computer lab, canteen, classrooms, and seminar halls. Every room has a Wi-Fi facility. The college is surveilled with CCTV cameras. It provides all the basic facilities required in a college. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it’s just a normal, average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The college looks like a coaching center rather than a large campus. Events are sometimes held in corridors or the gallery. Classrooms are good, well-ventilated, and air-conditioned. Hostel facilities are basic, with food being just average, but manageable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides us with Wi-Fi, smart board, and library for student use, and laptops are given. The college has exchange programs and interactive sessions. The college gives hostel facility as well for 1 year, and transport is provided as well for a price.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 11 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: An experiential and excellent learning experience of PGDM at IIBS
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is good. The lab and classrooms have centralized AC. The quality of food in the hostel mess is good. All the problems are being rectified as soon as possible. The hostel management is extremely helpful and kind. They always conduct surveys among students to know their problems.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Kristu Jayanti UniversityReviewed on 11 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It's the best for some students and a drawback for some.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is amongst the top, as they are trying to provide us with everything as much as possible. The hostel facilities are not up to the mark because there is a lot of shortage in everything. Other than that, we have good labs, classrooms, and libraries.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering, Bangalore UniversityReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Marvelous. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and knowledgeable; they teach very well which is easily understood. Infrastructure of our college is very beautiful and wide, which has many spots to explore. Many courses and departments are there to choose from. Classrooms are also good, well cleaned, along with a big library. Hostel facilities are also satisfactory because it consists of all essential needs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Small infrastructure with extensive knowledge and scope.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is small but has all the facilities related to study. Wi-Fi works fine, and there are 2 computer labs and also Bloomberg terminals, with which you can get certification. There are two libraries. I don’t know about the quality of the hostel and food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good academics with decent placements and supportive faculty - IIBS college review 2026.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have centralized ACs, and the students are extremely comfortable with the libraries and hostel, where we can expect good food and hygiene. Sports are conducted every academic year. Apart from that, indoor games are always available on the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Business StudiesReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A real PGDM experience at IIBS Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The campus is neat with good classrooms, a library, and common spaces. Life here is balanced-while academics are rigorous, cultural events, management fests, and clubs make it engaging. It is a good environment to build a peer network and learn teamwork. A new reading room has been allotted, and we have digital library access.

highlights.summary: Admission to Parul University Ahmedabad is now open for the year 2025. Candidates interested must visit the official website of the University and apply for the same.

college_info.intro:
Parul University Gujarat offers courses at the UG and PG levels in full-time mode. The University offers courses such as BSc, BHMS, and BPharma as some of the popular ones. Admission to the respective courses is offered based on merit and entrance. Parul University Vadodara offers courses curated by expert faculty in tune with the norms and regulations provided by the approving bodies.
he graduates are provided with the opportunity to avail placement assistance through some of the top recruiters of the industry in partnership with Parul University Ahmedabad Gujarat. For more details around Parul University Ahmedabad popular programmes, check out the table below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Parul University offers courses at the UG and PG levels for a span varying from 2 years to 5.5 years in full-time mode. The University offers respective courses with the fee structure covering a total tuition fee which may vary from INR 1.8 Lakh to INR 8.8 Lakh. Parul University of Ahmedabad offers admission to the respective courses based on merit and valid scores of accepted entrance exams.

faqs.answer: A:    Parul University Ahmedabad offers courses such as MSc at the PG level in full-time mode. Admission to the respective course is offered based on merit and entrance. Furthermore, the University offers respective course with a total tuition fees worth INR 1.9 Lakh. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation for primary qualification.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I really felt lucky because I am a student of Parul University.

review_content.Placements: 100 students placed in 1 st year of class. The salary package differs from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 80,000. I got an internship for 7 months in a college hospital. One month in the PHC and 4 months in another hospital, and only those students who pass the 4th BHMS exam can come for internship. As an open own homoeopathy clinic, work as a mo in hospital and go into research and the MD field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. The structure of the building is very good. Ventilation in class is also very good. Washrooms are neat and clean, and are available on all floors. The library is superb. It contains lots of knowledgeable books, magazines and articles, and our college also has Wi-Fi access, and the classrooms have a projector option.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A dream place for growth, where knowledge meets the individual.

review_content.Placements: In our course, no specific placements are arranged for homeopathy students. After completing the course, the main roles are Homoeopathic Physician or Medical Officer. Around 90 to 95% of students get internships in public healthcare and in multi-specialty hospitals, where they gain proper knowledge regarding treatment.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, hostels are available only for female students. The college has great infrastructure. Services are provided by the university. It includes the library, practical labs such as Anatomy Lab, Physiology Lab, Pathology Lab, Forensic Lab, and an auditorium with modern equipment.

review_summary.college_name: Parul University Ahmedabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best for education and co-curricular activities.

content.Placements: There were approximately 100 students in our class, and all of us got internships in different hospitals and PCs and our own attached hospital for a good number of days, and we learnt so much in that period. We could become general physician or work in a good hospital or clinic.
content.Infrastructure: There are labs, clinical teaching rooms, etc. This helps us to understand more about homoeopathy. There is also a hostel in our college, and there is a canteen and a mess which provides us with good food and a dining environment. There are also cultural fests.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with this college, but absolutely dissatisfied with the campus of the college.

content.Placements: 100 students were placed in my course, and 95% of the students got internships from our course. We practice in our personal clinic for homoeopathic practice, and we work as medical officers in multi-speciality hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Our library is very useful. Here, all the books of different authors are available. Many books on homoeopathy and other medical materials by different authors are available. These books are very useful for us and easily accessible.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I really felt lucky because I am a student of Parul University.

content.Placements: 100 students placed in 1 st year of class. The salary package differs from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 80,000. I got an internship for 7 months in a college hospital. One month in the PHC and 4 months in another hospital, and only those students who pass the 4th BHMS exam can come for internship. As an open own homoeopathy clinic, work as a mo in hospital and go into research and the MD field.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. The structure of the building is very good. Ventilation in class is also very good. Washrooms are neat and clean, and are available on all floors. The library is superb. It contains lots of knowledgeable books, magazines and articles, and our college also has Wi-Fi access, and the classrooms have a projector option.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A dream place for growth, where knowledge meets the individual.

content.Placements: In our course, no specific placements are arranged for homeopathy students. After completing the course, the main roles are Homoeopathic Physician or Medical Officer. Around 90 to 95% of students get internships in public healthcare and in multi-specialty hospitals, where they gain proper knowledge regarding treatment.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, hostels are available only for female students. The college has great infrastructure. Services are provided by the university. It includes the library, practical labs such as Anatomy Lab, Physiology Lab, Pathology Lab, Forensic Lab, and an auditorium with modern equipment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Supportive teachers, good campus facilities, and an industry-oriented BHMS course.

content.Placements: There are 100 students. Facilities include a wellness center, private hospitals, and local clinics. Common roles offered are Clinical Homeopathic Doctor, Medical Officer, and Pharmacovigilance Associate. Top job roles include positions in OPD consultation, patient care, research, and drug safety. Key profiles involve doctor roles, healthcare consultants, quality check, and medical content analyst positions. Students work in many hospitals. The top roles are practicing as a physician and as a professor.
content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped labs are available for different medical subjects. Classrooms are spacious and digital, with ICT projectors. The central library has course books, journals, and a reading area. There is good technical support. The overall infrastructure is clean. Mess food is average and hygienic, but has limited variety. Canteen food is better, with more options.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing choice for medical and a fun experience guaranteed.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in our course. You know I am in my second year so I don't have much idea about it but from what I have heard the salary package offered is 16 LPA. We don't need any company, because we have our hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing! The campus is lush and green, with various canteens, and Wi-Fi is available everywhere. The classrooms have air conditioning, and the library is clean and also air-conditioned, with three libraries located throughout the campus. Hygiene is maintained in all departments, although the labs do not have air conditioning.

reviews_list.review_title: Good at problem solving as well. No ragging of any sort.

review_summary.college_name: School of Dental Sciences (SDS), Sharda University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm really grateful and thankful for the quality education.

content.Placements: There are college placements present in the course. The duration for this placement or internship is 1 year. It's a paid one, along with good patient exposure and the best treatment modalities. Interns are allowed to assist and perform complex surgical procedures.
content.Infrastructure: The college is really well built, along with all the newly modified machines. AC is present in the lecture halls, clinicals, labs and clinics. Library is well AC centralized and all the necessary books are also present in the library. I do not have much information about the hostel as I am not a hosteller.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent college with abundance of opportunities.

content.Placements: There are no outside placements offered by the college, but the college itself offers an internship of one year with a pay of approximately 3500 rupees. The interns have fair exposure to patients, from great OPD numbers to various extractions and everything in between.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and libraries are fully equipped with all essential things and are fully air-conditioned, although the labs and clinics are not. Only decent infrastructure is available. The college doesn't have its own auditorium, instead, audit from departments is used when any event is to be held. The college offers a perfect environment for preparation for NEET PG.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Amazing choice for medical and a fun experience guaranteed.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in our course. You know I am in my second year so I don't have much idea about it but from what I have heard the salary package offered is 16 LPA. We don't need any company, because we have our hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing! The campus is lush and green, with various canteens, and Wi-Fi is available everywhere. The classrooms have air conditioning, and the library is clean and also air-conditioned, with three libraries located throughout the campus. Hygiene is maintained in all departments, although the labs do not have air conditioning.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: SDS- a good dentist college.

content.Placements: Since it is a dental course, no placement hospital or company visits us. One has to get placement on their own but the college prepares the students to face real-world challenges and start their own career in this competitive world and motivates them to do so. The top role offered outside the campus by any private recruiter is assistant dentist.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is fairly good; it houses all the latest equipment and is technologically advanced. It has good connectivity to the outside world as it is situated in the heart of Greater Noida and closer to Delhi. Hostel fees are a bit higher when compared to off-campus stays like PG and hostels around the campus. The food is provided 4 times in mess but the quality of the food is average. The hospital is on campus only and many restaurants are also available for students.

reviews.review_text:
The dental block, i.e., the School of Dental Science, will have full Wi-Fi connectivity.
Labs are well maintained and huge, with about 100 students capacity.
Classrooms are fully air-conditioned with well-maintained desks and chairs.

reviews.review_text:
AC-equipped and well-maintained classes are there.
Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day in the block of dentistry. We have the data center in our block, so any Wi-Fi-related issue can be solved here.

reviews.review_text: The hostels are well maintained, and the course is built according to the DCI guidelines. The course offers great learning opportunities. reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Dental Sciences, Sharda University.
reviews.review_text: There are basketball courts, football courts and many curricular activities. The hostel facility is very hygienic and good, and there are separate hostels for international and national students. The food is awesome here, and there is a homely environment in the hostel. The college has good administration, and the campus has all kinds of brands and cafes.

reviews.review_heading: Sharda is a good place for dentistry with knowledgeable professors and a great atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Sharda University offers Wi-Fi facility for all the students throughout the campus. The classrooms can be improved. Air-conditioners are not up to the mark in all the classrooms. There are various eateries all across the campus, and they offer good quality of food. Hostel rooms are great. However, food served in the mess can be majorly improved.

reviews.review_heading: Student Centric Institute, Good Learning Environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty basic, with little area to play. You cannot expect a ground. There's two building, with proper ventilation and furnishing. All rooms are equipped with projectors, and top of the line furnitures. There is also a reception area, and labs are equipped with top of the line amenities. It also has a big canteen area, open to all, with foods, snacks and everything. With big windows and ventilation.

reviews.review_heading: It was overall a good experience to spend the valuable 5years of my life at Sharda University.
reviews.review_text: We were provided labs with equipments, classroom with AC, projectors. We had library and a common room in our building only for the dentists. Yes, I would like to mention that we didnot have any canteen in our building. Canteen was available in the campus, so we used to go and have food there at times as it was a bit far from our building. Hostel rooms were quite good and the food provided in the mess were also fresh.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure with all facilities except swimming pool. The gym is highly equipped.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with highly facilitated libraries and cafeterias. Great scope for sports and other outdoor activities. Gym facility is good. A huge mall is present on the campus. The canteens make great food at cheap cost. The libraries are awesome with soundproof glasses. All the university has 3 ATMs and a highly equipped 500-bedded hospital with 24*7 medical facilities available. The hospital facilitates free treatment for the students.

reviews.review_heading: A well rounded campus experience.
reviews.review_text: Smart classroom with digital board, projector, and audiovisual setups. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day for online classes and streaming. Safety management was also good, with a CCTV camera working 24 hours a day. Student feedback was very good. Noise levels were generally low.

reviews.review_heading: Best university Fully satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very well and facilities too. Services are superb. Classrooms are fully cleaned & it is really large Classroom. The labs where practical are held are also good. I would say whole campus is superb. I really loved it. There are lot of sports like Table tennis, Chess, Football, Cricket etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you want a good package, then you should join this college.

content.Placements: Almost 95-96 percent of students in electrical have been placed. The highest package given is 1.2 crore per annum, which was in the field of cybersecurity. The lowest is around 12 LPA, and the average package is around 27 LPA, while the median is around 30 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Texas Instruments, Microsoft, and Nvidia. Around 50 percent of students from electrical engineering grab an internship. Specifically, this year, 55 students got an internship. [8 core and rest non-core ] Top roles include SDE, cybersecurity, VLSI designer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Sometimes there is a problem with Wi-Fi connectivity in our hostel rooms. The library is very good, and it contains all types of books that are required. Classrooms are okay. Labs are very good, but some of the equipment has mechanical errors. The medical facility is excellent. Food quality depends on which type of mess you have joined, like in a sattvik mess, where Jain food is served, the quality of food is excellent compared to other messes. The sports facility is also very good. The canteen also provides good food.

admission_overview.college_name: IIT BHU IIT Varanasi (BHU) Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Selection

admission_overview.title: IIT BHU Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: IIT BHU Varanasi Admission 2025 is currently ongoing and is primarily entrance-based. The candidates are selected through national-level tests conducted by various authorities. Popular as IIT Varanasi (BHU), the Indian Institute of Technology Varanasi offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in Engineering, Science, and Humanities. It runs under the Banaras Hindu University. It offers degree programmes like BTech, BTech-MTech (Dual Degree), BArch, BPharma, MTech, MPharma, MSc, and PhD. IIT Varanasi application form 2025 for all these courses can be filed by visiting the official website of the respective national/ state-level exams. However, PG applicants also need to register on the official admission portal of IIT Varanasi (BHU). Admission to all the courses is based on the scores obtained by the candidates in the respective entrance exams. IIT Varanasi (BHU) has developed an online international summer school on industrial CFD and FEM, a one-month job-oriented training programme.

paragraphs: IIT BHU, Varanasi admission process is a multiple-step process. Students can check the points below to know more:
1. IIT BHU Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission at IIT BHU are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. For example, for BTech, candidates are required to apply for JEE Main, followed by the JEE Advanced application. Similarly, for the MSc, the IIT JAM application form is required to be completed.
2. IIT BHU Selection Criteria 2025

After the conclusion of the application process, students are required to take the course-specific entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After which, counselling rounds are carried out for some of the programmes for the seat allotment process.
3. Admission Confirmation
Candidates selected after all the selection rounds can confirm their admission/seat by paying theIIT BHU fee.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech admission at IIT (BHU)?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission into BTech programme of IIT (BHU), a candidate should have passed Class12 with a minimum of 75 percent in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics.They have to as well pass the JEE Main and JEE Advanced exams.Selection and JoSAA counselling is done by JEE Advanced rank.Counselling is only an option to those who meet all the criteria.

faqs.question: What are the essential qualifications for admission to BTech course at IIT BHU?
faqs.answer: IIT Varanasi BTech admission is based on JEE Main and JEE Advanced. Students qualify Class 12 from the recognised board with 75% marks for general category and 65% marks for SC/ ST. PwD candidates.

faqs.question: Is BTech integrated programme offered at IIT BHU??
faqs.answer: IIT BHU does provide combined programmes of BTech and M.Tech in many specialisation.These programmes enable the students to pursue both their undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in a combined format.The admission requirements to such integrated courses frequently have a minimum of 75% board examination marks (or equivalent) in Class 12 (or equivalent) besides other conditions.

faqs.question: How to get admission in IIT BHU Varanasi for BTech in 2025?
faqs.answer: To secure admissison at IIT BHU for the BTech programme the aspiring candidates need to clear JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced. Once the score is out the candidates have to participate in JoSAA counselling round. To be eligible for the BTech programme the candidates need to have a minimum of 75% in Class 12. Finally, Admission is confirmed after document verification and fee payment.

courses_data.name: IIT BHU MTech Admissions 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:GATE, JEE Main, JEE Advanced, ICAR AIEEA
courses_data.description: Indian Institute of TechnologyBHU offers a two-year MTech programme, which is spread across four semesters. BTech graduates, fulfilling the eligibility criteria can apply for any of the seven MTech specialisations.IIT BHUMTech admission is through the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE). Candidates shortlisted based on exam scores have to further go through COAP counselling for final seat allotment. Read on to know more about IIT BHU MTech.

faqs.question: Can I do MTech at IIT BHU without GATE?
faqs.answer: As part of the admission procedure, the prospective candidates must also take a Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE).However, BTech qualified in IITs with an overall CGPA of 8.00 or above in 10 point scale are exempted with regard to the GATE and are directly eligible to the process.It is also worth mentioning that the minimum eligibility requirements are as well mandatory to the candidates who would like to join IIT BHU MTech programme in 2025.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to the M.Tech programme at IIT BHU?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the M.Tech programme at IIT BHU the aspiring candidates need to have a minimum of 60% in BTech. Aspirants with a score equal to or more than the cutoff also have to go through a counselling round. Once selected, aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for M.Tech course at IIT Varanasi?
faqs.answer: The application fee for the Master of Technology course at IIT Varanasi is similar to the application fee for GATE. This year, the application fee for the GATE goes slighltly higher. See the following columns for the updated fee:CategoryRegular PeriodDuring the Extended PeriodFemale/SC/ST/PwD* candidates (per test paper)10001500All other candidates including foreign nationals (per test paper)20002500

courses_data.name: IIT BHU MSc Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Indian Institute of Technology BHU Varanasi MSc admission is based on the applicant's CUET-PG score or IIT JAM. Shortlisted candidates also have to go through counselling for the seat allotment process. Aspirants seeking admission must hold a valid BSc degree with at least 50% aggregate. Candidates can apply through the CUET-PG admission portal. Read on to know more about IIT BHU MSc programme.

faqs.question: Does IIT BHU offers MSc?
faqs.answer: Yes, IIT Varanasi does offeres one postgraduate course in basic Sciences, name Master of Science (MSc). It is a full-time MSc programme offered in two specialisations. The programme is offered for a duration of two years, spread in a semester pattern.The key highlights of IIT BHU admission to the MSc are given below:ParticularsMSc HighlightsEligibilityBachelor’s degree with a minimum of 55% aggregateSelection CriteriaIIT JAM(seats allotted based on three rounds and two special rounds of CCMN Cou

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BHU IIT?
faqs.answer: The students who wants to get admission into BHU IIT, Varanasi must meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the course. They must appear and clear the JEE Mains and JEE Advanced exams to qualify for further admission process. For the BTech course admission students must complete class 12th from recognised board with minimum 75% marks. Then they must appear forJoSAAcouncelling process.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for IIT BHU MTech?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have BE/BTech/MSc or equivalent with (a) CGPA 6.00 on a 10-point scale or 60% marks in aggregate for General/OBC (Non Creamy Layer)/EWS. Category with valid GATE score BTech from IITs with CGPA of 8.00 without GATE are also eligible for admission. AMIE / Grad. IETE are eligible for the M.Tech programme at IIT BHU.

faqs.question: Till which date can I fill the choices in JoSAA counselling?
faqs.answer: The dates for JoSAA counselling 2026 choice filling will be announced once the result of JEE Main 2026 is declared. Candidates can fill choices only during the choice filling period. Also, candidates need to lock their choices before the last date.

placement_report.college_name: IIT BHU Placements 2026: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IIT BHU Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: IIT BHU placement report 2026 is released. As per the latest data released, the overall highest and average package received during IIT Varanasi placements 2026 was INR 1.67 Crore per annum and 29 LPA . A total of 1,228 full-time offers and 292 PPOs were made. The top recruiters included Google, ZS Associates, ICICI Bank and Meesho .

A total of 17 students received salary package above INR 100 LPA during IIT BHU Varanasi placements 2026. Most number of offers were made for SDE roles followed by ML/Quant, Analytics, Product and Core Engineering roles during IIT BHU placements 2026.
Earlier, during the 2024-25 session , the highest and average stipend recorded was INR 5 lakh and 1.04 lakh per month .
Placement data 2026 mentioned above is updated till Feb, 2026.

description: IIT BHU cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BTech, MSc, MTech, and other courses. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIT BHU JEE Advanced cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds, categories, etc. Further details regarding the latest exam events are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of IIT BHU JEE Advanced cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIT BHU cutoff 2026 is expected to be released tentatively in the month of June 2026. In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. During the IIT BHU JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 in the last round, the highest cutoff rank reached 14447 under the B.E. / B.Tech course for the General AI category students. With a lowest last round cutoff rank of 1489, B.T

IIT BHU B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 1489 and 14447, wherein the most sought-after specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with the lowest JEE Advanced cutoff rank. On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing, followed by B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 1924 and 2635, respectively, in the General AI category.

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT BHU. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view all the important JEE Advanced 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling was conducted in multiple rounds for admission to the IITs, NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs. Candidates with a valid JEE Advanced 2025 score can participate in JoSAA for BTech admission at IITs. Conducted by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA), in 2025, a total of six seat allotment rounds were released for admission. Aspirants preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise JEE Advanced cutoff lists for IIT BHU to un

IIT BHU JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 was announced for different specialisations and categories. In this section, candidates can do a comparative analysis of different colleges, and specialisations offered as per the JoSAA last-round closing ranks. Students can use the provided filters to refine their search based on parameters, like location, gender, categories, etc.

IIT BHU JAM cutoff 2026 for M.Sc. admission has yet to be released. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view last year's cutoff data and estimate the upcoming cutoff. The IIT JAM 2025 cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks across categories under the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the last round of the IIT BHU M.Sc. cutoff 2025 ranged from 325 to 409, with M.Sc. in Chemistry being the most competitive for admission. In the first round, the closing rank for

IIT JAM last round cutoff ranks over three years are presented in the table below. Students can use the provided filters and choose the rounds and categories to view the cutoff data. Considering the last year's cutoff data, M.Sc. in Chemistry had the lowest cutoff for admission in the last round. This indicates that demand for this specialisation was high in 2025 as compared to other MSc specialisations among the General AI category students. In the last round, the closing rank for this branch w

Aspirants with a valid score are then called for the counselling round for final seat allotment. Candidates preparing for admission can check out the important dates for IIT JAM 2026 to be eligible for admission to the MSc courses.

In 2025, four admission lists were released for IIT JAM for admission to the MSc course across multiple specialisations at Indian Institute of Technology, BHU, Varanasi.
