highlights.description: IIT BHU is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #31 in the Overall category, #10 under Engineering, and #22 under Research Institutions. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #531 to IIT BHU. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in IIT BHU rankings.

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, IIT BHU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. IIT BHU's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, IIT BHU fell 1 rank to #31 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Engineering' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, IIT BHU's rank is #10, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, IIT BHU's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
IIT BHU has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, IIT BHU fell 35 ranks to #566 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIT BHU climbed 36 ranks to #237 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIT BHU climbed 12 ranks to #49 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Explore the IIT BHU latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

reviews.review_heading: If you want a good package, then you should join this college.
reviews.review_text: Sometimes there is a problem with Wi-Fi connectivity in our hostel rooms. The library is very good, and it contains all types of books that are required. Classrooms are okay. Labs are very good, but some of the equipment has mechanical errors. The medical facility is excellent. Food quality depends on which type of mess you have joined, like in a sattvik mess, where Jain food is served, the quality of food is excellent compared to other messes. The sports facility is also very good. The canteen ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college IIT BHU because of facilities and good placement in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good at IIT BHU. Wi-Fi covers the entire campus, and classrooms are fully modernized. There are 4 lecture theatres in our college. For freshers, IIT BHU has the best hostel among all IITs, named PC Ray Hostel, which covers all required infrastructure and is newly made, so it looks aesthetic as well. There are 3 huge grounds in IIT BHU, which cover facilities for all sports. We have SAC for indoor games and a newly made gym, which is the biggest sports auditorium as well.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college ancient college in India.
reviews.review_text: There is a wide range of books available in our college. The variety of books is very nice. There we get books of spirituality, competitive exams, novels, biographies, self development and many more. The classrooms of our college are decent. The facilities is vey nice. The sports facilities in our college are excellent. There are 23 sports that are introduced in our college. In our college there are multiple clubs for the interests of every individual in our college. Our hostel is the newly ...

reviews.review_heading: IIT Bhu is a vibe, go enjoy it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library named the Shrinivas Despande Library. It had a vast collection of the latest and historical books. The facilities in the classroom were the latest but they do not have AC in the classroom but it contains a smart board, a green board and a projector. Our college had a gym which had the latest equipment and also three grounds. 2 volleyball court 2 lawn tennis court and many more courts for different games. Mainly, our college had a building name sac which contains all ind...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is nice we love it.
reviews.review_text: We have good food, a mess, Wi-Fi, a ibrary and a lot of things. The structure of labs and classrooms is old, it is already a bit old, but new halls are being built which are very good. Initially there are good facilities in the hostel but later on it happens that there is no water and the geyser is facility.

reviews.review_heading: IIT BHU, The best of the most.
reviews.review_text: One thing in which my college lags is infrastructure. It is not as great as other IITs. They are working heavily on improving it. New hostels are being made. Canteen services are being improved. Wi-Fi is good. AC is also being installed.

reviews.review_heading: I have an amazing experience at IIT BHU Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, but not so cool compared to other IITs. Day by day, infrastructure is getting better. Hostels are also getting renovated, and the new ones are quite good (for 1st and 2nd year). Mess food is obviously very good. The canteen is open till 3 AM, so it's very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: College is the support for all the sports and infrastructure, and the food is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are good, with table tennis, volleyball, and a badminton court. Food quality is very nice. Wi-Fi in the classroom is somewhat limited, but in the library it's excellent. An excellent thing about this college is the support for all the sports and infrastructure, and the food is also very good, with a protein-rich diet.

reviews.review_heading: Overview for freshers in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very modern but its bearable. In recent months it has upgraded a lot by adding ACs and new buildings. Wi-Fi is great all over the campus from the start, hostel rooms and bathrooms are good as well for a government college. There is a variety of food in the mess at a time and the menu is not repeated all week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college if you are going for placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is okay, the classrooms are old, basically, the whole infrastructure is old. Some buildings are good. First-year hostels are good. The food provided in the mess is good. Sports and games facilities are also good. The infrastructure is kind of old, and we do not have AC in the lecture theatre (now being installed).

reviews.review_heading: My college is good, the best for placements and much more. You will have quality time for a duration
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, not that good. There is no such AC and no more big building new hostels are being built but those are for seniors because for 1 st year there are good hostels. Sports facilities are not good in hostels. You have to go to college facilities for that, and the medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Best engineering college in Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my department is good. The past is the nearest department. Hostels have CCTV cameras, a water cooler, vending machines, and a canteen. The quality of the food is good. We have a study room in the hostel. There is a common room on each floor in which we play table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Lifetime experience in IIT BHU.
reviews.review_text: The library has vast resources, and classrooms are a mix of modern smart rooms and older halls. Hostels are mandatory for B.Tech students & very affordable. Rooms are mostly double/triple sharing for juniors with basic facilities, a bed, table, chair and cupboard. The mess food is average with a varied menu of North/South Indian dishes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indian Institute of Technology, BHU, Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are old, but everything needed is provided to us. Wi-Fi facilities are absolutely good. Classrooms are okay. The library is an absolute part of our college, and it has all types of book collections needed for a student. The hostel rooms are too cozy and small. The food is not that good in taste, but the quality is good enough.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very modern. The Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The classrooms, library, and labs are very calm without any disturbance. The hostels and mess are very neat. The college has a hospital. For sports, we have several grounds and a student activity centre.

college_info.college_name: IIT BHU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IIT BHU provides merit-cum-means scholarships to 25 percent of undergraduate students. Apart from this, the institute also offers a list of international scholarships, including Rhodes Scholarships 2019, University of Oxford, USIEF Fellowships for Indian Citizens: 2019-2020, Japanese Government [MEXT] Scholarship Program 2019 for Research Students along with many more. All the students (non-sponsored) admitted to MTech and MPharm programmes are provided financial assistance equivalent to the junior research fellowships. All eligible students admitted to PhD programmes also received scholarships from the institute.

More than 30 courses are available at Usha Martin University in a variety of subject areas, including engineering, applied sciences, management, pharmacy, computing and information technology, humanities, agriculture, journalism, and mass communication.

Among other undergraduate programs, the university provides BCA, BBA, B.Com, BA(Hons), BTech, BA LLB, BPT, BPharma, and BA JMC. The university provides PG programs in MBA, MCA, MA, LLB, and LLM. faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation policy at Usha Martin University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, a student can get admission in BCom courses at UMU without a CUET score. Any student who has passed Class 12 with a minimum mark of 50% in aggregate is eligible to apply for the aforementioned courses. Moreover, the selection is also made on the basis of Class 12 marks and the university's seat intake.
faqs.question: Can I join Usha Martin University BCom programme without CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Usha Martin University accepts CUET-UG for BPharma and other UG programmes. Candidates are required to clear the entrance exam after the application process is done. Since the CUET-UG results are declared candidates can visit the official website of the university and check their respective cut-offs for the programmes they have applied for. The scorecards will be released after the normalization of scores all test takers as the exam was held on multiple days.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement support and practical learning, but curriculum and activities need upgrades.

review_content.Placements: Currently pursuing a BCA from Usha Martin University, I’ve found the placement opportunities to be quite promising. Around 70 to 80% of students from our course are placed through campus drives. The highest package offered so far has gone up to 10 LPA, while the average package ranges between 3.5 to 4 LPA. Most of my seniors received packages around 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: As a BCA student at Usha Martin University, I’d say the facilities and infrastructure for our course are quite decent. Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet access. There’s Wi-Fi available across the campus, including in the labs and library, which helps a lot during assignments or project work. The classrooms are spacious and have projectors for smart learning sessions. The university library is also a good resource. It has a wide range of books, journals, and e-resources that we can access for academic use.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are well-qualified and also knowledgeable.

review_content.Placements: 60-70% of students were placed in good companies, getting jobs ranging from 3.5 LPA to 10 LPA, including Tata, Airtel, Tech Mahindra, Reliance, and others. Almost 80% of students also got internships, mostly with IT companies like Q Spider, Pentagon Space, etc. MBA, BBA, Pharmacy, LL.B., and many more were good courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost all facilities were available, like systems, boards, and AC in the labs, and everything was good in the classrooms with smart boards. In the libraries, almost all books were available. The food quality in the hostel was good, and the taste was also not bad. Sports and medical facilities were also available in our hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Usha Martin University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good on the campus.

content.Placements: Everything is good and going smoothly because we have supportive staff members in the training and placement department. They help us and support our needs, and also guide students in their own careers and tech. They also guide on placements.
content.Infrastructure: All things on the campus are good. The conditions of the campus are good.
content.Faculty: All staff members of my college and the examination department are really good. They help and support students. If students face any problem, then they really help them in a good manner. They are always ready to help us. They are really very kind. All staff members, both teaching and non-teaching staff members, are very good. They always tell students to focus on their career and tech.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good for placements and a good infrastructure with all facilities.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA. Internship opportunities at my college are also good. All batch gets good internship opportunities in all fields for their future benefits and if they do great in internships they get an offer for a permanent job.
content.Infrastructure: Given all facilities Wi-Fi, labs, library, and washing machines are available. The quality of the food in canteen is also good. Medical support is also available 24/7, with extracurricular activities on campus like in-ground gym, basketball, badminton courts, volleyball and a great ground for cricket lovers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placement support and practical learning, but curriculum and activities need upgrades.

content.Placements: Currently pursuing a BCA from Usha Martin University, I’ve found the placement opportunities to be quite promising. Around 70 to 80% of students from our course are placed through campus drives. The highest package offered so far has gone up to 10 LPA, while the average package ranges between 3.5 to 4 LPA. Most of my seniors received packages around 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: As a BCA student at Usha Martin University, I’d say the facilities and infrastructure for our course are quite decent. Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet access. There’s Wi-Fi available across the campus, including in the labs and library, which helps a lot during assignments or project work. The classrooms are spacious and have projectors for smart learning sessions. The university library is also a good resource. It has a wide range of books, journals, and e-resources that we can access for academic use.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are well-qualified and also knowledgeable.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students were placed in good companies, getting jobs ranging from 3.5 LPA to 10 LPA, including Tata, Airtel, Tech Mahindra, Reliance, and others. Almost 80% of students also got internships, mostly with IT companies like Q Spider, Pentagon Space, etc. MBA, BBA, Pharmacy, LL.B., and many more were good courses.
content.Infrastructure: Almost all facilities were available, like systems, boards, and AC in the labs, and everything was good in the classrooms with smart boards. In the libraries, almost all books were available. The food quality in the hostel was good, and the taste was also not bad. Sports and medical facilities were also available in our hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Hey, I am Rishav Raj, and I am grateful to write a review about our college.

content.Placements: Companies come to our college for internships. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest package is 2-3 LPA. In our college, various faculty members are available and helpful to students. The campus is like heaven.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructures are best in our college. Hostel and other things provided. Many types of things that can help to increase more students, and have various types of activities like football stadium also there in our college. The name is Amitabh Choudhary Stadium.

admission_overview.college_name: Usha Martin University Admission 2025 (Open): Eligibility, Selection Process, Dates

paragraphs: Usha Martin University admission 2025 is open.Candidates seeking admission can apply online by visiting the official website of UMU. Usha Martin University admission to the majority of courses is merit-based. Candidates seeking admission can apply online by visiting the official website of the college. Usha Martin Universityoffers over31 programmesacross10 streams. The University offers BCA, BBA, B.Com, BA(Hons), BTech, BA LLB, BPT, BPharma, and BA JMC, among others at UG level. At PG level, the university offers MBA, MCA, MA, LLB, LLM. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to full fill the admission criteria set by the college. Given below are more updates related to Usha Martin University admission. course wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Usha Martin University offers admission to all its UG and PG programmes on the basis of candidates’ performance in the last qualifying examination. Candidates seeking admission to any of the courses can apply both online as well as offline.Usha Martin University coursesalong with their selection criteria are given below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

Merit-based
's admission procedure incluUsha Martin Universitydes multiple steps. The admission is conducted in both online and offline mode. Find belowUsha Martin University admission process:
Step 1: Usha Martin University Application Process

Candidates must visit the official website of Usha Martin University to apply online. For the offline mode, candidates can download the admission form for their selected programme from the university website and submit the duly filled forms to the University at the suggested address.
Step 2: Usha Mertin University Shortlisting

Candidates are shortlisted based on candidate's performance in their last qualifying exam and also in the entrance exams. The university also conducts entrance test for few courses and personal interviews for selections.
Step 3: Usha Mertin University Final Admission
Shortlisted candidates must pay the admission fee to finalise their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Does Usha Martin University offer MBA programme?

faqs.question: Is Usha Martin University good for BTech?
faqs.answer: Usha Martin University (UMU),  Ranchi isan ISO 9001:2015 Certified University.It has been recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), and is amember of the Association of Indian Universities (AIU). The University is renowned for its advanced academic resources, well-qualified faculty, and a wide range of extracurricular, cultural, and sports activities. As for the placements, which is the overall good. A total of73 students were placedin leading companies such as SBI Life Insurance, ESAF Small Finance Bank, Vivo, and many others. MBA emerged as thetop departmentwith the highest number of students placed. Further, theUsha Martin Universitythe highest packageoffered during 2023 placements wasINR 10 LPA.

faqs.question: How good is Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training, MIT ADT University in terms of ranking?
faqs.answer: Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training is a new specialised navy academy established in 2018 by MIT ADT University in association with the Indian Navy. While it does not rank among top colleges presently, it has approvals from DG Shipping and AICTE. Its parent MIT ADT University also has low rankings currently. However, the focused naval training and connections with the Navy provide good credibility and prospects. The BTech Marine Engineering programme is the flagship course. Though traditional rankings are low owing to nascency, the niche focus provides potential for future growth and placements in the naval domain.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to D.Pharma at Usha Martin University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are seeking admission to the UMU DPharma course must ensure that they are eligible to apply in the first place. If eligible, they can fill out the course-specific application form via online or offline mode. The application for the DPharma programme is INR 500.After the application stage is completed, the university will communicate the rest of the admission requirements via mail. Students must follow the steps mentioned in the mail. Those who are offered admission must pay the fees to confirm their seat.

reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures are best in our college. Hostel and other things provided. Many types of things that can help to increase more students, and have various types of activities like football stadium also there in our college. The name is Amitabh Choudhary Stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, and the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel was good. It had all the facilities, but the mess food taste was not up to the mark. Students couldn’t go out after 7 pm and could only roam inside the campus. The college hostel had many facilities like Wi-Fi, 24/7 electricity, both AC and non-AC rooms for students, and common washrooms, as well as attached washrooms for individual rooms.

reviews.review_heading: UMU: A Gateway of Opportunities.
reviews.review_text: UMU provides labs for practical classes and assignments with the latest technology, along with Wi-Fi and table internet connection. UMU also provides a library containing reference books for particular courses. UMU provides spacious and good-quality classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: About Usha Martin University.
reviews.review_text: All classes have free Wi-Fi access. There are electric slab mechanical labs and a physics lab. All classes are very big and have smart boards in them. The college has a very big and central library that has a vast amount of books, with e-library availability. There is a common cafeteria for all students in the college, which has a large variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: For the MCA course facilities and faculty is good at this college.
reviews.review_text: Usha Martin University has a well-maintained and well-developed infrastructure for the MCA course. The college provides Wi-Fi throughout the campus for students and also provides labs, a library, and a canteen. The quality of these facilities is very good. The labs have proper systems for students to do their practical work. The college also provides various types of sports facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Usha Marti University Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very much provided here, like Wi-Fi is available everywhere, labs are available and well-maintained classrooms are available. The Central Library is present, where all books and journals are. Hostel facilities are very good and rooms and bathrooms are provided. Mess food is also good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: College has satisfactory facilities and qualified faculty for the MCA Course.
reviews.review_text: Students used to get all the necessary facilities, such as computer labs, WiFi, libraries, canteens, classrooms with modern facilities, etc., at this college. All these facilities are of good quality. Infrastructure for the MCA course is also good. Sports and hostel facilities are also available for the interested students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and qualified faculties.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is well designed and beautiful. We have separate hostels for boys and girls and a common mess for all. The classrooms are well designed and organized. The classrooms even have projectors. And even students get access to the Wi-Fi, and also the university is clean.

reviews.review_heading: UMU: A Maverick Journey to Success.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at our college is very impressive, with different blocks of buildings assigned to specific groups of departments for a comfortable flow of classes. Our institution also has library facilities with a good availability of journals and course books, which can be issued anytime on campus through a library card. The canteen is large and offers a wide variety of food, with proper sanitation maintained by the canteen authority. Medical facilities are also available, including an OPD ...

reviews.review_heading: College for a better future.
reviews.review_text: The building and hostel are very well maintained. The college has a clean and friendly environment that promotes happiness. The canteen and mess provide great food for students. Medical facilities in case of any accidents are also available through OPDs.

reviews.review_heading: I never get bored in my college life. Just some ups and downs happen when thinking of placement.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about facilities, they are, like, okay. The summer season feels totally dead as there are no air conditioners in classes; only in labs will you get air conditioning. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Only some classes have a smart board. The library is on the 1st floor, and all types of books are available for your course-related needs. I don't opt for hostels, so I don't know anything about them, but yeah, there are water problems during summer and the food is also not too good. The ca...

Merit-Based:
These scholarships are awarded based on the score in the qualifying exam. Below are the details:

Domicile Based: The students having domicile in Jharkhand and enrolled in any programme can avail 10% scholarship. However, students who are getting merit scholarships will not be eligible for domicile based scholarship

college_info.intro:
Guru Kashi University offers a large diversity of courses to students at its campus. Students can access UG programs, among which the popular courses include BBA, BEd, BVoc, among others. The Bachelor of Arts (BA) GKU course is available to students in a large collection of specializations.
Students can pursue higher education with PG programs like MBA (Agribusiness), MA, MTech, MEd, among others. Students seeking to pursue research and doctorate fields can choose from the various PhD programs at GKU Bathinda.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    Placements are good, approximately 90% of students get placed. Top companies come and recruit the students. It is the top recruiting university. The highest package offered here was 7 LPA and Average package is around 2-3 LPA and good packages are offered. Roles such as marketing are offered in the agriculture course.
faqs.question: Is Guru Kashi University good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Guru Kashi University does offer internships to MBA students. There are a number of documents and PdF on the university's official website that include information about the placement cell and internship opportunities given by the university. However, GKU Bathinda does not specify the duration of internships for MBA students.
faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University offers internships to MBA students?

faqs.answer: A:    Guru Kashi University has tie-up with more than 200 companies for on-campus and off-campus placement for all streams. The major recruiters included Airtel, Apollo Tyres, Convergys, Genpact, Oracle, HCL, Mahindra, IBM, Axis Bank, Infosys, and more
faqs.question: How many companies participated in Guru Kashi University placements 2023?

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Guru Kashi University expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    Every course at Guru Kashi University has different eligibility criteria for admission purposes. For B.tech the candidate must have done his class 12 from a recognised board. The university also accepts LEET which is a state-level lateral entry entrance test.For Mtech the candidate should have a minimum of 50% marks in the Bachelor of the same course. For an MBA, the candidate must have completed his graduation from a recognized university. For PhD, the admission is based on the entrance test. For other UG and PG courses, admission is done according to the merit of students.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Kashi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.

content.Placements: 70% of students in my course get selected. The highest package is 6.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package ranges from 3-3.5 LPA. Honda and Tech Mahindra are the top companies that visit the college to hire students from my course. 60% of students got internships from my course in the HDFC Bank. The top role offered is a manager.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.

content.Placements: About 50 to 60% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, and the average is 3.50 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Kent, Nestled, etc. About 70 to 80% of the students get internships. Top roles are AI ML, and web development.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are not that enough. Around 2-3% of students got placements. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the minimum is 2 LPA. There are many companies like JU, Prabhat Seeds, etc. In this course, the top roles are to manage the agricultural field, pesticide distribution, safe use, and many banking jobs like assistant manager are there.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college.

content.Placements: It is a great university where many students secure placements after finishing their studies. Last year, many students achieved about 100 out of 30-40. So, it is a nice university you can check out if you want to pursue a degree or master’s in any field.
content.Infrastructure: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed here. The highest package here is 10 LPA, and the lowest package ranges from 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Amazon. Around 80% of students secure internships in companies like Microsoft, Deloitte, and startups.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

admission_overview.college_name: Guru Kashi University Admission 2025: Process, Eligibility, Dates

paragraphs: Guru Kashi University has over 100 courses in 16 domains that are offered at the UG, PG, & PhD levels.
Find below the eligibility and selection criteria:
Guru Kashi University 2025- Admission Process
Find below the detailed process for Guru Kashi University admissions 2025:
1: Guru Kashi University Application Process 2025

Just so you know – the filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Guru Kashi University. However, the application & entrance test fee will be paid online & candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the 2 copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
2: Selection Rounds
Admission to all the PG courses at Guru Kashi University is entrance-based.
3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After completing all the selection rounds, candidates must appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of the Guru Kashi University fee to secure their seats.

headings.text: 2025 Guru Kashi University Admission: Eligibility and others

courses_data.name: Guru Kashi University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Kashi University's BE/BTech programme offers 300 seats across various disciplines like Mechanical, Petroleum, Civil, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering. Eligibility requires a 50% score in CBSE 12th or equivalent exams. With 60 seats allocated to each specialisation, students can pursue their desired field in engineering at Guru Kashi University.

faqs.question: Can I join Guru Kashi University - GKU without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Every course at Guru Kashi University has different eligibility criteria for admission purposes.For B.tech the candidate must have done his class 12 from a recognised board. The university also accepts LEET which is a state-level lateral entry entrance test.For Mtech the candidate should have a minimum of 50% marks in the Bachelor of the same course.For an MBA, the candidate must have completed his graduation from a recognized university.For PhD, the admission is based on the entrance test.For o

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take BTech admission at Guru Kashi University - GKU?
faqs.answer: The procedure to get admission in any course at Guru Kashi University (GTU) is through entrance examinations like CMAT, CAT etc. On the basis of marks attained in these entrance examinations a merit list is created and that would be the deciding factor of whether or not you would be getting a seat in GTU.In order to get admission in B.Tech one should give JEE Mains and advanced examination. Scoring a decent rank will led to your name in the merit list and ultimately an admission in GTU

courses_data.name: Guru Kashi University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Kashi University's MBA/PGDM programme in Agri Business Management for 2025 offers 75 seats. Eligibility requires a 45% score in both graduation and CBSE 12th exams. The programme accepts scores from CAT, MAT, XAT, and CMAT exams.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University - GKU accept CAT for MBA?
faqs.answer: Guru Kashi University is one of the top MBA colleges in India. It is a 2-year full time program. Yes, it accepts CAT ( Common Admission Test) for MBA but it's not compulsory to give thai exam. CAT exam is an entrances exam which is widely accepted in manh colleges but it is not mandatory for all MBA admission. You can also find many other alternatives for CAT like CMAT, GMAT, MAT and XATXAT entrance exam which are also accepted by many colleges.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Guru Kashi University expensive?
faqs.answer: Punjab, India, starts at INR 2 Lacs and can go up to INR 25 Lacs per year.Some say the fees are expensive, with the first and second semesters costing INR 62,580 and the second year costing INR 60,580

faqs.question: When I can apply for Guru Kashi University MBA courses?
faqs.answer: Guru Kashi University is going to open its admission portal for the academic batch 2025. Currently, candidates can raise an inquiry for admission but the application process has not been started yet. Prospective candidates should keep a check on Guru Kashi University MBA admission dates from the official website of the university or can directly reach to university's admission office.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University (GKU) in Talwandi Sabo, Bathinda, offers a 100% fee refund policy for students who withdraw from admission, according to their policy and without any charges. GKU is recognised by the UGC and has been accredited by NAAC with an A+

faqs.question: Can I take direct admissions to BCom courses at Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University offers merit-based admission to BCom. Candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria and apply on the official website of the university. After all the procedures the institute releases its merit list. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit then they have to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

placement_report.college_name: Guru Kashi University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Guru Kashi University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered during Guru Kashi University placements in recent past stood at INR 100 LPA . The top recruiters in recent past included U Mumba , PlanetSpark and TCS

faqs.question: Is Guru Kashi University good for placements?
faqs.answer: Placements are good, approximately 90% of students get placed. Top companies come and recruit the students. It is the top recruiting university. The highest package offered here was 7 LPA and Average package is around 2-3 LPA and good packages are offered. Roles such as marketing are offered in the agriculture course.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University offers internships to MBA students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University does offer internships to MBA students. There are a number of documents and PdF on the university's official website that include information about the placement cell and internship opportunities given by the university. However, GKU Bathinda does not specify the duration of internships for MBA students.

faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Guru Kashi University good?
faqs.answer: Almost every student at Guru Kashi University (GKU) gets placement in top MNCs. The average package is around INR 3 lakhs, the highest package is around INR 6,50,000 lakhs, and the minimum salary for the students is INR 1,50,000 per annum.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing BCom from Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Guru Kashi University can apply to various government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

hostel.description: The hostels available are AC and Non AC types.

library.description:
Central library in any educational Institution occupies the place of the heart. Like the heart supplies blood to various arteries, by way of books, knowledge flows from the library to various departments and individuals i.e staff and students. The GKU Central Library has a1500 sq meters cover area. It has got following sections- Reference Section, Borrowing Section, Magazine Section, Browsing Section, and Reading section. The library has the collection of more than 54000 volumes of books and over 100 journals.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Language Lab, Physics Lab, Entomology Lab, Horticulture Lab, Plant Pathology Lab, Soil Science Lab, Anatomy & Physiology Lab, Diagnostic Lab, Food & Beverage Lab, Accommodation Lab, Front Office Lab, Programming Lab, Linux Lab, Database Lab, Heat Transfer Lab, Strength of Material Lab, Applied Thermodynamics Lab, Fluids Mechanics Lab, Petroleum Chemistry Lab, Chemical Reaction Engineering Lab, Industrial Pollution Abatement Lab, Multimedia Lab, Network Lab, Software Engineering Lab, Hardware Lab, Communication Skills Lab, Electronic Devices & Networks Lab, Linear Integrated Circuits Lab, Analog Electronics Lab, Analog Communication Systems Lab, Digital Communication Lab, Psychology Lab, Electrical Technology Lab

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college.
reviews.review_text: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

reviews.review_heading: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but placement percentage is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, and the buildings are superb. You can get free Wi-Fi, advanced labs, and a library here, but the classrooms are average not bad, but not the best. Hostels are good, and the food is also good. I was living in Shivalik Hostel, and that was awesome. Sports ground, medical facilities, and games, everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very good, the faculty is very good, but the placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are two types of hostels, on-campus and off-campus. For off-campus hostels, two-seater and three-seater rooms are available. The campus has Wi-Fi, mess, and canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and Supportive behaviour of the Staffs
reviews.review_text: Hostels are divided into three facilities :- A/C, Cooler, and fan. There are two playgrounds for the students to play. It is fully covered by wifi . Meals are awesome. Wardens are more supportive. There are central library, and many computer labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied because there is no good infrastructure, campus and management.
reviews.review_text:
Hostels are not good not bad, just average. 
But college infrastructure like labs and classrooms is not good, and sittings are also bad.
The main issue in summers is no proper fan working and in labs there is no AC.
In classrooms, there are only 5 fans, and strength of the students is 60.

reviews.review_heading: A glance of GKU. Faculty is very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The labs are equipped with modern instruments but we rarely use them. Classes are normal at any school in the city. There is no air conditioning in classes. Wi-Fi facility only for faculty members. Projectors are there in some classrooms. The boys hostel rooms have attached washrooms, while the girls hostel does not. Average medical facilities are there. Mess food is very bad. Sports and game facilities are the best. Our university will rank 5th in Khelo, India, in 2023.

reviews.review_heading: If you have a budget above INR 4 lakhs for MBA, don't consider GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Classes are equipped with fans but no ACs. Yes, we have projectors in classrooms but no proper board for that. There is one smart lab & computer lab, but again with limited facilities. Yes, the quality of food in the hostel mess is good but rooms are overcrowded with 4 boys in a single room.

reviews.review_heading: Great Faculty and family-like College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course, such as Books, Materials, Records, and Bluebooks for internals, we should pay for. In classrooms, there are Fans and Smart-TVs. The Library offers all facilities. Classrooms are large and spacious. The Hostel facilities are great. They offer more facilities, like food in the Mess. The quality of food in Mess is good. Medical facilities and many facilities. The Infrastructure of the College is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty and facilities offered by the GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the GKU available for the MBA was good. The college had a pretty big and beautiful campus. Facilities like Wi-Fi, computers, labs, libraries, canteens, halls, auditoriums, etc. were given to the students. A hostel was available for the students of the college. The facilities offered at the college were above average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Kashi University.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in our classrooms with developed infrastructure. Digital classrooms are available with free Wi-Fi facilities. Many sports facilities are available in our college. The mess available in our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a mind-blowing university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is mind-blowing. Hostel gives a homely feeling home. Food served in the mess is very good. Physical education is good. All the facilities are available in the mess. Doctor is available at the university. Library and computer lab are available.

faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by AISSMS College of Pharmacy?

review_content.General: There are well-equipped labs with all instruments needed for pharmaceutical research. There are only 4 classrooms with good ventilation. There is a pilot plant that has all instruments used in industry. There are 4 labs on each floor. There is an NSS committee and an APGA committee for all extracurricular activities. The college allows us to play sports in competition. The college gives exposure by sending us to various conferences and giving us the chance to represent our research projects. There is only one canteen on the campus. It is good, but not worth it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college and had a great time in college.

review_content.Placements: For placement, one should have a 6.0 GPA or above. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest is 15 LPA. Companies like Sanofi Pharma Ltd participate, with QC and QA roles mostly offered. The college infrastructure is great; labs are well-equipped with necessary equipment and chemicals for tests. We also worked on in-house projects.
review_content.Infrastructure: Spacious classrooms, labs, library, ground, canteen, common area separate for boys and girls, etc. are there. We had our own cricket, volleyball, basketball, athletics, Kabaddi, football, badminton and many other teams. We also won intercollege competitions in these years.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: AISSMS college: path to your dreams.

review_content.Placements: Companies like TCS and Sun Pharmaceuticals collaborated with our college for placements, as well as various institutes like the RACE Institute for placements. Also various skill development courses organized and managed at college level by the Mahandra Foundation program. The average package is 3.5 to 4.5 lakhs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very well organized and awesome, with facilities including wifi at every floor, a library that has access to various paid journals and databases for research studies, well-equipped labs and classrooms and also filtered water availability at every floor . Also, college has a big playground for sports activities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: You can give other competitive exams at other universities and pay the exact same fee for 4.

content.Placements: Above 30 students got placed. The lowest package is 1.56 LPA, and the highest salary is above 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The companies our college recruits are Cipla, Sun Pharma, Lupin, Glenmark, Emcure, etc. Internships are like 200 or above. Talking about roles offered in pharmacy R and D, F&D, marketing, cosmetics production, and research.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very spacious, with a great Wi-Fi connection and projector. Projectors are of good quality with a light generator. Labs have all of the required materials for practicals. Library is also worthy. College canteen is not very good but okay.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the teaching of faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: There are no placements through college for the B.Pharma level, but teachers and the placement committee help us get jobs by giving references in the industry. The college does not offer internships, and students have to search for internships on their own. The college just supports by giving documentation needed for internships.

individual_reviews.title: Unveiling My Campus Life - Samiksha Jawarkar

content.Placements: There is a training and placement cell that organizes various sessions, such as personality development sessions by the Naandi organization for girls. This has a valuable impact on improving personality and skills. Around 50% of students are placed, while the rest are pursuing courses related to pharmacy. The highest package for students after higher education is around 4.5 lakhs. The top companies that visited our college include Dr. Reddy, Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, and others. Our college organizes various programs related to pharmaceutical science, including a VALUE ADDED ADVANCED INSTRUMENTATION course that provides certificates for each seminar, webinar, and personality development session.

reviews.review_text: Our college is well-known for the Master of Pharmacy program, which ranks among the top 5 colleges in Pune for M Pharm. We have excellent facilities for students for research purposes along with practical skills. As a Pharmacology student, our college provides various instruments for research and has an Animal House that includes various kinds of experimental animals. Every classroom is equipped with a digital projector, and free Wi-Fi is available. Our college offers a variety of books, includi...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best location, faculty, and staff members .
reviews.review_text: AISSMS College of Pharmacy is located in Shivaji Nagar near the metro station, which makes it very easy for people from longer distances to travel. Infrastructure is the best, as it has well-designed laboratories for each subject and departments are distributed separately.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff with good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure available in the department, including a good library, classrooms and labs with limited connectivity. Wi-Fi overall is not good. Canteens, sports and games are well-suited for sports; that's enough for a good education institute for students .

reviews.review_heading: AISSMS college of pharmacy is one of the best colleges for the pharmacy course.
reviews.review_text: The college does not provide any medical facilities. The college has Wi-Fi labs and a library. The labs do not have adequate glassware and chemicals for the 120 students. The food quality is not good for health. Sports and game events are held.

reviews.review_heading: The diary of AISSMS COP PUNE.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of college was updated and renewed in 2024. There are all the necessary labs for all subjects and all the necessary equipments. There is Wi-Fi on campus routers on each floor, separate from the library.
There is an animal house for college and there is also a pilot plant in college that has industry machines to show some basic working.

reviews.review_heading: AISSMS College of Pharmacy is one of the good colleges in Pune.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with smart screens and projectors. The classes have benches, though a few are broken. Labs have working equipment and good-quality chemicals. There is no Wi-Fi yet. The library is equipped with textbooks, research papers, and reference books, though personal books are not allowed in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Bundle of experiences. AISSMS College of Pharmacy
reviews.review_text: Facilities available to students are good. A library is provided to the students, which contains a variety of books, journals, pharmacopoeias, and research papers for reference. Also, wi-fi facilities are provided. Classrooms are also cleaned for study.

reviews.review_heading: I wish students got more industrial knowledge than theory, as it would help them in their future.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully equipped with projectors, Wi-Fi in the library and computer room and also in practical labs with a lift and a CCTV camera. The food in the canteen is of moderate quality but palatable; it maintains all the hygiene and the overall taste is good. The college is equipped with first-aid and medical facilities. Every year, the college conducts a sports week called 'Ranangan' which is very sporting and celebrated and enjoyed by all the students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the crowd, staff, and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for different subjects and also a library, auditorium, and classrooms. Labs are also well-equipped. The college doesn't have any hostels. The B.Pharma course has 8 semesters; each semester has different subjects that have both theory and practical exams.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. There is no private hostel at the college. The canteen facility is okay. Labs are well maintained and equipped, but they must develop more, especially in management. Library facilities and service are the best. Overall, the college supports in-house projects and supports students in using laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: Review of M.Pharma pharmaceutical Chemistry.
reviews.review_text: All books related to pharmacy are available; a book list is available for searching for books. Classrooms have amenities like projectors, and an internet lab is also available. The campus has basketball, badminton and cricket pitches, and various intercollegiate tournaments are organized for students. Also, indoor games like arm wrestling, carrom, chess, table tennis, etc. are played during sports week. The college has an NSS event with 20 students. Yes, we have our own hostel, and the food is g...
